item.title: Bitcoin verstehen вАУ Episode 321 - Dein Sparkonto bringt Null: Warum Bitcoin mehr liefert und risiko√§rmer ist. Mit ETF-Pionier Dr. Gerd Kommer
item.description:
In dieser Folge sprechen wir mit dem ETF-Experte Dr. Gerd Kommer, Gr√Љnder der Gerd Kommer Invest GmbH und Autor des Bestsellers вАЮSouver√§n investieren mit Indexfonds und ETFs". Er erkl√§rt, warum klassische Bankguthaben nach Abzug von Inflation und Steuern kaum reale Rendite bringen und weshalb aus seiner Sicht nur wenige Anlageklassen, darunter Bitcoin, diese Schwelle √Љberspringen k√ґnnen. Au√Яerdem geht es um seinen Zugang zu Bitcoin √Љber ETPs, die Unterschiede zwischen Bankkonto und Bankdepot bei einer Bankpleite, und warum er selbst auf Selbstverwahrung von Bitcoin verzichtet.


Wir arbeiten an einem Programm, das euch Schritt f√Љr Schritt bei der sicheren Bitcoin-Verwahrung begleitet. Wer ihr als Erstes informiert werden m√ґchtet, sobald es losgeht, dann tragt euch hier in unsere Warteliste ein.

Jeden Montag 5 interessante Medien rund um Bitcoin & Geld sowie donnerstags die Zusammenfassung unserer aktuellen Episode in euer Postfach? Dann meldet euch zu unserem Newsletter an.

item.title: Einfach Bitcoin Podcast вАУ KI und Bitcoin: Neue M√ґglichkeiten f√Љr Anleger
item.description:
---werbung---
Entdecke die pure Kraft der Natur mit Nature Heart und sichere dir jetzt 10 % Rabatt auf dein neues Lieblingsprodukt рЯМњ

https://nature-heart.de/NaturesSon

Gutscheincode: NaturesSon10
---werbung---

KI und Bitcoin: Neue M√ґglichkeiten f√Љr Anleger

Die Blockchain-Technologie hat in den letzten Jahren enorm an Bedeutung gewonnen. Sie gilt als f√§lschungssicher, da jede Transaktion √Љber ein dezentrales Nutzernetzwerk gepr√Љft und die Informationen verschl√Љsselt gespeichert werden.

Ein weiteres Thema, das k√Љrzlich f√Љr Aufsehen gesorgt hat, ist die K√Љnstliche Intelligenz (KI). Der KI-Chatbot ChatGPT und Software, die Bilder auf Basis von Text-Beschreibungen erzeugen kann, haben einen regelrechten KI-Hype ausgel√ґst.

Bitcoin und K√Љnstliche Intelligenz

item.title: The Bitcoin Matrix вАУ Bitcoin Against the Machine | Kent Halliburton, Sazmining
item.description:
"Mining isn't just how Bitcoin gets made вАФ it's a decentralized money printer."

Kent Halliburton вАФ CEO and co-founder of Sazmining вАФ makes a claim that should bother everyone who only buys their Bitcoin: mining isn't just how Bitcoin gets made, it's a decentralized money printer anyone can run. He calls it hash punk. We get into why you get better Bitcoin when you mine it, his arc from solar to hosted mining, and the bigger thesis вАФ Bitcoin isn't one zero-to-one innovation, it's two.

This is Bitcoin against the machine.

Subscribe so you never miss an episode.

item.title: The Wolf Of All Streets вАУ "Bitcoin Will Be MUCH Higher In A Year" - Matthew Sigel
item.description:
Matthew Sigel from VanEck breaks down exactly how his Node fund has outperformed Bitcoin by 100 percentage points since launch, why he's been overweight miners pivoting to AI and underweight exchanges and altcoins, and why he believes Bitcoin will be materially higher a year from now. He explains why the OpenUSD consortium of 140 companies threatening Circle and Tether will likely struggle because consortiums historically fail without a clear business driver, reveals that Bitcoin's hash rate is in its longest decline ever without making a new high as listed miners exit for AI data centers, argues that alt season already happened in crypto equities rather than tokens, shares why he respects the four-year cycle and tells clients to have their full position by October, and makes the case that strategy DATs should carry a living will that forces an unwind if they trade below MNAV for too long.

Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

]]>

item.title: What Bitcoin Did вАУ Has Bitcoin Lost Its Narrative? | Fernando Nikolic
item.description:
вАЬMaybe itвАЩs time to kill your heroes again, and Saylor is now the hero to slay in this cycle.вАЭ

Fernando Nikolic is the founder of Perception. In this episode, we get into whether Bitcoin has lost its narrative, why Michael SaylorвАЩs messaging has changed, and how narratives can move markets. Fernando breaks down the shift from SaylorвАЩs early Bitcoin maximalist language to the more recent focus on credit, derivatives and Strategy as a financial product.

We also get into whether BitcoinвАЩs rebel era is over, why the ETF approval may have marked the end of Bitcoin as a countercultural movement, and whether Bitcoin adoption is now becoming more fragmented, boring and inevitable.

We also get into the death of monoculture, the way the internet has broken shared reality, and how AI, Spotify and algorithmic feeds are creating a more homogenised culture.

THANKS TO OUR SPONSORS:

ANCHORWATCH

BLOCKWARE

LEDN

BITKEY

SWAN

CAPE

FOLLOW:

Danny Knowles: https://x.com/\_DannyKnowles or https://primal.net/danny

Fernando Nikolic: https://x.com/basedlayer

]]>

item.title: Once Bitten! A Bitcoin Podcast. вАУ A My Fisrt Bitcoin Node In Cordoba, Argentina! Trevor Schrock
item.description:
Grass roots Bitcoin Education is spreading around the world.

$ BTC 60,260

Block Height 956,255

Today's guest on the show is Trevor Schrock, the founder of Bitcoin School Argentina, based in C√≥rdoba.

Trevor shares his personal journey, revealing he was born in Southern California but has strong family ties to C√≥rdoba, Argentina, where his father was born.

He first encountered MyFirstBitcoin's open-source educational materials while living in Mexico City and was inspired to return to Argentina, seeing its ripe conditions for Bitcoin adoption

Key Topics:

  • Trevor Schrock's personal journey to Bitcoin and move to Argentina.
  • The founding and mission of Bitcoin School Argentina.
  • Argentina's unique economic context, hyperinflation, and the "currency competition."
  • Adaptation and use of MyFirstBitcoin open-source educational materials.
  • Challenges and successes of running a Bitcoin education center.
  • The importance of physical spaces and community meetups for Bitcoin education.
  • Advice and inspiration for starting local Bitcoin education initiatives.

Follow Trevor here:

X - @BitcoinSchoolAR

Learn more here: https://bitcoinschoolar.com/

Check out my book вАШChoose LifeвАЩ - https://bitcoinbook.shop/search?q=prince

item.description:
Cole Walmsley is an advocate for monetary truth whose work explores Bitcoin, freedom, and the mystery of existence.

вАЇ https://x.com/Cole_Walmsley

вАЇ https://youtube.com/@bramkвБ†вБ†

вАЇ https://x.com/bramk


рЯХС¬†TIMESTAMPS

00:00 Understanding Money and Its Impact on Society
03:19 The Spiritual Connection to Money
06:43 The Consequences of Monetary Debasement
08:26 Psychological Effects of Scarcity
10:07 Nature's Lessons on Value and Energy
13:48 Historical Lessons from Economic Disobedience
27:03 The Impact of Economic Systems on Life Choices
35:15 Bitcoin as a Tool for Enlightenment

54:52 Bitcoin as a System of Order vs Fiat Chaos
58:44 The Future of Money: A World of Abundance

вДєпЄП¬†EPISODE SUMMARY

Bram Kanstein and Cole Walmsley go past price and charts into what money actually does to you, practically and spiritually. Cole has spent over 10,000 hours studying money, and his core message is simple: if you don't understand money, you don't understand the world it creates. They get into debasement as a consciousness problem, why your worth can never be erased even when your money is, how fiat misaligns us with nature, and a picture of a Bitcoin future so abundant it's almost hard to imagine.

item.title: Nodesignal - Deine Bitcoin-Frequenz вАУ Reupload: Nodesignal-Techboost - E254 - Nerds unter sich: Highlights der btc++ lightning edition
item.description:
In der heutigen Folge (Re-Upload!) sprechen Jan-Paul und Calso mit Chistian Decker, Rene Pickhardt und Calle auf der btc++ Lightning Konferenz in Berlin √Љber die aktuellen Themen, die die drei aktuell im Lightning bzw eCash am meisten besch√§ftigen. Sie reflektieren √Љber die Entwicklung des Lightning-Netzwerks, die Bedeutung von Multiparty-Channels, sprechen √Љber Multinut Payments und die Bedeutung von PTLCs f√Љr die Privatsph√§re im Lightning-Netzwerk. Zudem wird die Rolle von Blockstream Greenlight in der Bereitstellung von Lightning-Infrastruktur er√ґrtert und die Herausforderungen, die noch bestehen.

Von und mit:

вАУ Calso

вАУ Jan-Paul

вАУ calle

вАУ Christian Decker

вАУ Rene Pickhardt

Produziert und geschnitten: Thorsten

Hier k√ґnnt ihr uns eine Spende √Љber Lightning da lassen: вЪ°пЄПnodesignal@getalby.com

Wenn euch unsere Arbeit gef√§llt, k√ґnnt ihr unsere Folgen auch auf Podcasting 2.0 Plattformen, wie Fountain, PodcastGuru, Castamatic, Breez oder Podverse h√ґren und uns so eine kleine Aufmerksamkeit da lassen. Danke an alle, die die Bitcoin Community mit ihren Spenden unterst√Љtzen! Mit diesen Spenden wird unter anderem unser Bounty Programm verwirklicht, in dem ihr euch f√Љr die Mitarbeit an einem Projekt eine Belohnung sichern k√ґnnt.

F√Љr Feedback und weitergehenden Diskussionen kommt gerne in die Telegramgruppe von Nodesignal und bewertet uns bei Spotify und Apple Podcasts, das hilft uns sehr. Folgt uns auch gerne bei Nostr:npub1n0devk3h2l3rx6vmt24a3lz4hsxp7j8rn3x44jkx6daj7j8jzc0q2u02cy und Twitter.

item.title: The Bitcoin Broadcast вАУ I Got Hacked | Stay Humble Stack Sats | Taxation is Theft | Live W/ Anthony, Joel and Vince
item.description:
In this episode, Vince shares his harrowing experience of being hacked on social media, the importance of cybersecurity, and the broader implications for Bitcoin and digital assets. The discussion also covers market sentiment, Bitcoin's long-term value, and the role of Bitcoin in energy and societal systems.In this episode, youвАЩll discover how scammers craft near-perfect phishing emails leveraging AI, watermark tricks, and emotional manipulation. Vince shares the behind-the-scenes tactics hackers use to deceive even seasoned users, plus the critical steps to lock down your accounts before itвАЩs too late. Anthony and Joel break down why the rising threat of digital attacks demands a new level of securityвАФturning a terrifying experience into powerful lessons for your own safety.We also explore the broader implications: what happens if platforms like X (Twitter) become hubs of risk for your assets? How can BitcoinвАЩs unique self-custody model save you from system failures? And why staying humble as a Bitcoin holder isnвАЩt just about moralsвАФitвАЩs a safeguard against market euphoria and societal manipulation. From the potential of Bitcoin to revolutionize energy grids to the hypocrisy of government censorship, this episode is a deep dive into how your greatest threatвАФand your strongest resistanceвАФare connected.Anthony's X Account: https://x.com/AntMoon5Joel's X Account: вБ†https://x.com/JoelHodlmanVince's X Account: https://x.com/HodlFloridaYouTube: вБ†вА™вА™вА™¬†@TheBTCBroadcast¬† Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/thebitcoinbroadcast/Sponsors:Protect Your Seed Phrase with MicroSeed: вБ†https://microseed.io/?ref=TBBвБ†Use Code "TBB" for 5% off your MicroSeedBitcoin Well: вБ†https://bitcoinwell.com/referral/vinc...вБ†#bitcoinвБ† вБ†#btcвБ† вБ†#investing вБ†#podcastвБ† вБ†#LiveshowвБ†For entertainment Purposes Only. Not Financial Advice.Chapters00:00 Introduction and Guest Introduction02:52 The Hacking Incident: A Cautionary Tale11:57 Reflections on Bitcoin's Current Market Dynamics20:59 Building Conviction in Bitcoin During Market Downturns29:57 The Future of Bitcoin: Speculation and Market Sentiment34:35 The Responsibility of Bitcoin Advocacy38:14 Navigating Bitcoin's Public Perception40:43 Taxation and Government Spending Concerns44:56 Bitcoin's Role in Energy Management49:15 The Future of Bitcoin Amidst Political Uncertainty

item.title: Stephan Livera Podcast вАУ Fedimint in South Africa: Zero Fees & Community Custody | SLP752
item.description:
A South African circular economy is already running real payments on Fedimint with seven guardians on Start9 boxes. Users send eCash with zero fees inside the federation and feel the same simplicity as Wallet of SatoshiвАФexcept the custody is local and the privacy model is different.

Hermann and Joshi explain how non-technical guardians set up 5-of-7 multisig, how the Conduit wallet hides complexity, and why Fedimint beats Liquid on on-chain integration and local trust. They also cover Lightning gateway economics and why small federations may beat one global Spark.

Bitcoiners exploring Lightning, eCash privacy, and circular economies in emerging markets should listen.

Key Takeaways:

  1. Seven-guardian 5-of-7 multisig on Start9 now runs daily in South Africa with high reliability.

  2. Users inside the same federation enjoy true zero-fee eCash transfers.

  3. Conduit wallet offers a lighter, payments-focused alternative to Fedi with regional QR support.

  4. Migration between federations is smooth with parallel running and user-controlled timing.

  5. Fedimint severs the transaction graph for privacy while Liquid hides amounts but retains the graph.

  6. Local guardians reduce the вАЬcustodial guiltвАЭ felt when onboarding users to foreign services.

  7. Lightning gateways can become profitable side businesses with only a few hours of monthly work.

  8. Geographic spread of guardians improves resilience against local internet or power outages.

  9. Onboarding still requires one extra stepвАФjoining the federationвАФafter app install.

  10. Fedimint is on-chain native, allowing direct receive and send without intermediate swaps.

Timestamps:

00:00 - Fedimint Goes Live in South Africa

01:48 - Magic: Pay Across Africa

04:15 - Onboard Users Without Custodial Guilt

08:08 - Zero Fees Shock Rural Users

11:04 - Liquid vs Fedimint Privacy Showdown

13:32 - Many Small Federations Or Global Spark

16:09 - Non-Techies Run Bitcoin Guardians Easily

18:14 - 5-of-7 Multisig Survives Two Failures

20:53 - Fedimint QR Is a 5-of-7 Multisig

24:05 - Gateway: Profitable Hobby in Hours/Month

31:06 - Trust Locals Over Anonymous Custodians

34:55 - Spread Guardians to Survive Outages

Links:¬†

  • Bitcoin Ekasi: https://bitcoinekasi.org

  • Fedimint: https://fedimint.org

  • Conduit Wallet: https://joschisan.github.io/conduit/

  • SLP651 with Eric & Joschi: https://stephanlivera.com/651

  • Follow Hermann: https://x.com/vryfokkenou

  • Follow Joschi: https://x.com/joschisanbtc

Stephan Livera links:

  • Follow me on X: @stephanlivera

  • Subscribe to the podcast

  • Subscribe to Substack


]]>

item.title: Bitcoin & Beyond | Dein Geld neu denken вАУ Jetzt auch noch die 2-Euro-Order: der Trade-Republic-Gr√Љnder erkl√§rt die Hintergr√Љnde
item.description:
Das Start-up Trade Republic ist wegen der 1-Euro-Geb√Љhr f√Љr B√ґrsentrades zur ersten Anlaufstelle f√Љr Millionen von Anlegern geworden. Nur: Erst ein spezielles Gesch√§ftsmodell hat die Billig-Konditionen erm√ґglicht, das nun aber verboten ist. Viele Anleger fragen sich deshalb: WarвАЩs das mit dem 1-Euro-Trade? In dieser Folge sprechen wir mit Christian Hecker, Mitgr√Љnder von Trade Republic, dar√Љber:

  • wieso der 1-Euro-Trade trotz des Verbots erhalten bleibt,
  • warum Trade Republic sein Geb√Љhrenmodell dennoch anpasst (und den 2-Euro-Trade einf√Љhrt)
  • und wieso jetzt noch eine ganze Menge anders l√§uft.

Disclaimer: Dieser Podcast ist keine Anlageberatung, sondern dient lediglich der Information und Unterhaltung. Die Hosts oder der Verlag √Љbernehmen keine Haftung f√Љr Anlageentscheidungen, die ihr aufgrund der im Podcast geh√ґrten Informationen trefft.

item.title: Onramp Bitcoin Media вАУ Bitcoin Is the No Kings Trade
item.description:
The Last Trade: Jackson, Michael, and Brian go signal versus noise with Bitcoin back near $58K and roughly 50% off its all-time high. They make the deep value case against the largest Bitcoin ETF outflows in over two years, arguing the selling is retail capitulation and an AI rotation trade rather than a true institutional exit. They explain why the 200-week moving average is historically the time to accumulate and why DCA beats chasing performance. They break down Saylor's stretch (STRC) rescue plan, X Money's 6% yield launch, gold's quiet underallocation, and Gavin Newsom's billionaire tax. They close on America 250 and Bitcoin as the real No Kings protest.


---


рЯФЄ Connect with Onramp: The leader in resilient, fault-tolerant Multi-Institution Custody for secure, enduring bitcoin ownership.


рЯСЙ Onramp Finance: https://onrampbitcoin.com/finance

рЯСЙ Sign up for Genesis: https://onrampbitcoin.com/finance#gen..

рЯУ© Schedule a consultation: https://meetings.hubspot.com/onrampbitcoin/tlt


The Last Trade: a weekly, bitcoin-native podcast covering the intersection of bitcoin, tech, & finance on a macro scale. Hosted by Jackson Mikalic, Michael Tanguma, & Brian Cubellis. Join us as we dive into what bitcoin means for how individuals & institutions save, invest, & propagate their purchasing power through time. It's not just another assetвА¶ in the digital age, it's The Last Trade that investors will ever need to make.


рЯОЩпЄП About This Episode

The guys open on the Bloomberg "crypto's institutional buyers retreat" headline and a record month of roughly $4 billion in Bitcoin ETF outflows, the largest since the funds went live over two years ago, and argue it is mostly retail capitulation plus an AI rotation into names like Nvidia and Broadcom rather than a true institutional exit. They make the deep value case: Bitcoin near $58K and about 50% off the 2025 peak of $126K, the 200-week moving average as a historic accumulation zone, and a viral River retrace chart that some read as bearish but they frame as a reason to DCA and leg in. The signal-versus-noise segment digs into Strategy's stretch (STRC) confidence crisis, covering Saylor's five-point plan, a dividend bumped from 11.5% to 12%, a Bitcoin monetization program willing to sell up to $1.25 billion of BTC, and Parker Lewis's note on a $1.15 billion equity raise subordinated behind $22 billion in liabilities. They unpack X Money's launch (6% yield, up to $10 million in FDIC coverage, 3% cash back, a Visa metal card), the censorship and yield-source questions it raises, and Ford rehiring 300 engineers after AI failed its quality checks. They close on gold's underallocation from the In Gold We Trust report (over 80% call gold sensible, yet allocations sit near 1%), Gavin Newsom's national billionaire's tax and the Mamdani socialist wave, and an America 250 round-the-horn that ties Thomas Jefferson's warning on banking establishments to Bitcoin as the ultimate No Kings protest.


рЯІ† Chapters

00:00 - Market Sentiment and ETF Flows

02:55 - Retail vs Institutional Investors

05:54 - DCA Strategies and Long-Term Conviction

08:46 - The Impact of AI on Investment Dynamics

12:08 - Financial Advisors and Emotional Investing

15:07 - Stretch and Market Confidence

17:50 - X Money and the Future of Financial Products

32:39 - Exploring X Money and Financial Integration

36:00 - The Role of AI in Financial Services

40:01 - Gold's Place in Modern Investment Strategies

45:01 - Gavin Newsom and the Call for an Economic Reset

52:03 - Independence Day Reflections and Bitcoin's Role


рЯТ° Subscribe & Stay Ahead


Get Onramp's weekly Research & Analysis:

High-signal insights in bitcoin, macro, and custody.

рЯУ© https://onrampbitcoin.com/research


Subscribe to Onramp Media for more:

рЯОІ The Last Trade | Final Settlement | Scarce Assets

item.title: Unchained вАУ How Ethereum Institutional Intends to Grow Ethereum's Market Share
item.description:
Joseph Chalom lays out why Ethereum Institutional exists, how it differs from Etherealize, and why he thinks Michael Saylor is in a pickle.

========================================================

Thank you to our sponsor!

  • вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†FidelityвБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†: Fidelity has been building in crypto and DeFi since 2014 вАФ now they're hiring. Explore career opportunities at one of the most forward-thinking names in finance here: вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†crypto.fidelitycareers.comвБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†.

  • вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†CapeвБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†: Your biggest crypto vulnerability isn't your wallet, it's your phone number. Cape is America's privacy-first mobile carrier that rotates your SIM identity daily and blocks SIM swaps before they happen. Get 33% off your first six months at cape.co/unchained (use code: UNCHAINED).

========================================================

Sharplink, BitMine, and Joe Lubin spent the past ten days launching two new organizations aimed at convincing Wall Street to build on Ethereum, backing them with commitments from more than fifty institutional supporters.

Joseph Chalom, CEO of Sharplink and a board member of the new Ethereum Institutional, joins Laura Shin to make the case that Ethereum's real competition isn't Solana or Canton. It's inertia: the reluctance of the world's largest institutions to touch financial rails they don't already trust.

Chalom walks through how Ethereum Institutional differs from Etherealize and the Enterprise Ethereum Alliance, why Robinhood building on Arbitrum still counts as a win for Ethereum, and what it would take for ETH to capture the value flowing through the network as tokenized real-world assets grow past $31 billion. He pushes back on claims that the Ethereum Foundation's culture is broken, then turns to Strategy's preferred stock drama and says plainly that Michael Saylor is in a pickle.


Host:

  • вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†Laura ShinвБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†, Host / Unchained

Guests:

  • вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†Joseph Chalom - CEO of Sharplink

Timestamps

рЯЪА 01:33 Why Sharplink, BitMine, and Joe Lubin launched Ethereum Institutional

рЯІ≠ 05:51 How Ethereum Institutional differs from Etherealize and the EEA

рЯГП 10:15 Chalom says institutional inertia, not Solana, is Ethereum's real threat

рЯТЩ 14:40 Cape: Get 33% off your first six months with code unchained at https://cape.co/unchained

рЯТЉ 15:34 Fidelity: Explore crypto careers that could change your future at https://crypto.fidelitycareers.com

рЯІ© 16:20 Why Chalom says Robinhood building on Arbitrum is still a win for Ethereum

вЪ° 20:54 Does value actually flow back to ETH the token

рЯПЫпЄП 24:33 Chalom pushes back on the idea that Ethereum's culture is broken

рЯ§Э 29:01 Why Chalom says Sharplink's shareholders and Ethereum's ecosystem are aligned

рЯУЙ 32:18 Chalom says Michael Saylor is in a pickle over Strategy's preferred stock drama

]]>

item.title: The Bitcoin Frontier вАУ Inside Wall StreetвАЩs bitcoin playbook with Denny Galindo
item.description:
Denny is a wealth manager and bitcoin research lead at Morgan Stanley, where he bridges traditional finance and bitcoin for high-net-worth investors. He operates inside one of the worldвАЩs largest financial institutions while developing frameworks to help advisors understand and allocate to bitcoin.

In this episode, Denny joins The Bitcoin Frontier to share how investors should think about bitcoin in a portfolio, the three core investor buckets driving adoption, and his thoughts on determining whether youвАЩre underweight or overweight bitcoin. We dig into bitcoinвАЩs market cycles and seasonal framework, the role of global money supply in driving returns, and practical strategies for gaining exposure in a volatile asset.

SUPPORT THE PODCAST:
¬†вЖТ Subscribe
¬†вЖТ Leave a review
¬†вЖТ Share the show with your friends and family
¬†вЖТ Send us an email: podcast@unchained.com
¬†вЖТ Learn more about Unchained: https://unchained.com/?utm_source=you...
вЖТ Book a free call with a bitcoin expert: https://unchained.com/consultation?ut...

TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 вАУ Intro & DennyвАЩs role bridging traditional finance and bitcoin
2:00 вАУ From equity research to leading bitcoin insights at Morgan Stanley
4:20 вАУ The three investor buckets: digital gold, venture, and diversifier
7:30 вАУ How institutions evaluate volatility and correlation
10:50 вАУ Where bitcoin fits in portfolios today (risk asset vs store of value)
14:00 вАУ How to determine if youвАЩre underweight or overweight bitcoin
18:00 вАУ Why most investors are still early (0вАУ4% allocation range)
21:40 вАУ Will the three investor frameworks converge over time?
23:10 вАУ Bitcoin cycles: macro liquidity vs halving-driven supply shocks
26:30 вАУ Using cycles for rebalancing vs long-term holding strategies
31:20 вАУ Tail risks: quantum computing and вАЬearthquakeвАЭ scenarios
36:10 вАУ Bitcoin as a global store of value and M2-driven returns
41:10 вАУ Modeling long-term returns: monetary expansion + adoption
48:30 вАУ How to build a position: dollar-cost averaging and timing
52:15 вАУ Seasons of bitcoin: winter, spring, and portfolio adjustments
55:00 вАУ What it takes for bitcoin to become a standard portfolio allocation

WHERE TO FOLLOW US:
вЖТ Unchained X: https://x.com/unchained
вЖТ Unchained LinkedIn: ¬† / unchainedcom¬†
вЖТ Unchained Newsletter: https://unchained.com/newsletter
вЖТ Denny GalindoвАЩs Twitter: https://x.com/DennyGalindo¬†
вЖТ Timot LamarreвАЩs Twitter: https://x.com/TimotLamarre¬†


]]>

item.title: Swan Signal Live - A Bitcoin Show вАУ OpenUSD, Bitcoin Cycles, and AmericaвАЩs Monetary Future
item.description:
• Brady and John kick off with World Cup excitement, celebrating Team USAвАЩs gritty performance and using the tournament as a metaphor for global monetary competition
  • The discussion explores the emergence of OpenUSD (OUSD), a new stablecoin standard backed by more than 140 companies, and whether it represents meaningful decentralization or simply a private-sector version of a CBDC
  • The hosts argue that despite branding around openness and neutrality, OUSD remains a centralized, censorable dollar token fundamentally different from Bitcoin
  • John frames money as an ongoing global competition, suggesting that Bitcoin and fiat currencies are likely to coexist for many years due to the enormous network effects of existing monetary systems
  • Alex ThornвАЩs Bitcoin bottom indicators show several classic bear market signals triggering, reinforcing the idea that Bitcoin may be approaching a cyclical bottom while acknowledging this cycle differs in magnitude from prior ones
  • The conversation examines the persistence of BitcoinвАЩs four-year timing cycle, debating whether market participantsвАЩ expectations could become self-fulfilling and drive renewed momentum later in the year
  • Macro charts highlight continued expansion of the U.S. money supply and federal debt, reinforcing BitcoinвАЩs long-term monetary thesis despite current market weakness
  • The hosts discuss signs that speculative crypto venture capital is collapsing while AI attracts investment, arguing that 2025 may ultimately be remembered as the end of the crypto boom rather than Bitcoin itself
  • Brady closes with a Fourth of July reflection, arguing that Bitcoin embodies the principles of individual liberty, property rights, and sound money that animated AmericaвАЩs founding debates

item.title: Bitcoin Magazine Podcast вАУ The End of the 4-Year Bitcoin Cycle вАФ Why the BTC "Capital Cycle" is Next w/ Alex Leishman | BMP Ep 15
item.description:
Is the Bitcoin treasury boom good or bad for Bitcoin? Could it be the next big bear-market blowup? River's Alex Leishman gives his honest, measured take alongside host Brandon Green in this bear-market check-in. They cover store of value vs. medium of exchange, why Bitcoin payments still don't beat Apple Pay, and why stablecoins are really just a workaround for broken dollar rails.


рЯФґ Host: Brandon Green вАФ BTC Inc CEO

рЯФґ Alex Leishman вАФ River


Chapters:

03:40 вАФ Why Bitcoin Lags Despite Perfect Conditions

10:11 вАФ Bitcoin Interest on Cash: Replacing Your Bank

16:33 вАФ Betting on Bitcoin, Not Crypto: The Coinbase Contrast

23:11 вАФ Is River a Bank? Bitcoin Banking Explained

27:11 вАФ 3.3% vs 12%: River vs. Bitcoin Treasury Yields

32:00 вАФ Why River Refuses to Go Public

36:35 вАФ Stablecoins Are "Just Dollars"

42:04 вАФ Will Bitcoin Ever Be a Real Medium of Exchange?

47:32 вАФ Bitcoin as Global Reserve & River's Endgame

Is the Bitcoin treasury boom good or bad for Bitcoin? Could it be the next big bear-market blowup? River's Alex Leishman gives his honest, measured take alongside host Brandon Green in this bear-market check-in. They cover store of value vs. medium of exchange, why Bitcoin payments still don't beat Apple Pay, and why stablecoins are really just a workaround for broken dollar rails.


рЯФґ Host: Brandon Green вАФ BTC Inc CEO

item.title: Bitcoin Audible.DE - Die besten Bitcoin-Artikel, vorgelesen in deutscher Sprache! вАУ 208. Martin Connor - Bitcoin, das ultimative Kollateral
item.description:
von Martin Connor вАУ Originaltitel: ¬ЂBitcoin: The Ultimate Collateral¬Ђ

*вАЮDie beste, einfachste вАУ ultimative вАУ Form der Kreditsicherheit ist etwas, das sofort beansprucht und verkauft werden kann, wenn der Schuldner seine Zahlungen nicht leistet. Der Verkauf eines Hauses kann Monate oder sogar Jahre dauern. Auch Aktien haben zeitliche Beschr√§nkungen. Bitcoin jedoch nicht. Bitcoin ist immer in BewegungвАЬ
*

(Martin Connor)

Wenn man Bitcoin als hartes, in seinem Kern nicht ver√§nderbares oder manipulierbares Asset begreift, welche M√ґglichkeiten er√ґffnen sich dadurch? Das Buch вАЮBitcoin: Die ultimative KreditsicherheitвАЬ untersucht, wie die Bereiche Bitcoin und Kreditvergabe perfekt zusammenpassen. Etwa, wie Bitcoin-Besitzer und Bitcoin-Unternehmen den maximalen Wert aus ihren Bitcoins herausholen k√ґnnen, ohne sie verkaufen zu m√Љssen.

Wir lesen ein Kapitel aus diesem Buch, das eine zentrale Idee beleuchtet: Bitcoin als die beste Sicherheit, die die Menschheit je hatte. Die meisten Menschen denken beim Thema ¬ЂSicherheit¬ї an H√§user, Aktien, Gold und Bargeld вАУ aber weil es scheinbar nichts Besseres gab, √Љbersehen sie deren enorme Schw√§chen. Die Kombination der Elemente von Multisignatur вАУ echtes gemeinsames Eigentum, perfekte digitale Knappheit, Portabilit√§t und die un√Љbertroffene Verf√Љgbarkeit von Bitcoin вАУ unterscheidet es grundlegend von herk√ґmmlichen Besicherungsmodellen.

Verkaufe Deine Bitcoins niemals вАУ lebe davon.

Weitere Empfehlungen:

  • Pierre Rochard: ¬ЂDer Nutzen des Sparens¬ї (Ep. #019)
  • Tomer Strolight: ¬ЂWarum Bitcoin?¬ї (Ep. #80-82)
  • Saifedean Ammous: ¬ЂF√Љr eine R√Љckkehr zu niedriger Zeitpr√§ferenz¬ї (Ep. #77)
  • Pierre Rochard: ¬ЂBitcoin vs. Gold¬ї (Ep. #71)
  • Hans-Hermann Hoppe: ¬ЂDer Ertrag aus gespartem Geld вАУ neu √Љberdacht¬ї (Ep. #18)
  • Parker Lewis: ¬ЂDie ¬ЂBezahlвАШ mich in Bitcoin!¬ї-Theorie¬ї (#140)
  • Parker Lewis: ¬ЂBitcoin-Zahlungen: Die вАєJemand ist der N√§chsteвАЇ-Logik¬ї (#151)
  • HodlHodl.com f√Љr Belehnung von Bitcoin, ebenso wie Unchained Capital, Ledn, Firefish etc.

Abonniere BitcoinAudible.de und empfehle unsere Vorlesungen jedem, der/die sich f√Љr Bitcoin interessiert. Hilf damit auch anderen, Bitcoin von einem starken monet√§ren, wirtschaftlichen und philosophischen Fundament aus zu erkunden.

Unterst√Љtze bitte unser Projekt und sende uns Sats via Lightning oder n√Љtze eine der anderen Optionen.

Tipp: Bitcoin nur mehr KYC-frei kaufen! Auf HodlHodl.com ist das recht einfach, und mit Anmeldung √Љber den obigen Link reduziert Du dar√Љber hinaus sogar auch die Spesen f√Љr Deine ersten K√§ufe dort.

]]>

item.title: Dein Weg zu Bitcoin вАУ Frauen sind die bessern Investoren! - Traut (es) euch (zu)! вАУ Dein Weg zu Bitcoin mit Marie von Bose
item.description:
Marie hat genau das gemacht, was viele sich nicht trauen: Sie hat den sicheren Angestelltenjob hinter sich gelassen und sich als Crypto-Traderin selbstst√§ndig gemacht. Doch der eigentliche Wendepunkt kam mit einer einfachen Frage: вАЮWarum √Љberlasse ich meine Finanzen eigentlich anderen?"In dieser Folge erz√§hlt Marie ihre pers√ґnliche Reise вАУ von Glaubenss√§tzen ums Geld (вАЮ√Ьber Geld spricht man nicht"), √Љber erste zaghafte Schritte mit Altcoins bis hin zu einem klaren Bekenntnis: Bitcoin als Wertspeicher, der unabh√§ngig macht. Ein Gespr√§ch √Љber Mut, Vorbild sein, Geschichte (was hat 1977 mit deiner Freiheit zu tun?) вАУ und die Frage: Was geben wir der n√§chsten Generation eigentlich wirklich mit?

рЯІ† Themen in der Episode:вЬЕ Maries Weg vom Getreidehandel ins Crypto-Trading вЬЕ Warum Frauen am Kapitalmarkt untersch√§tzt werden вАУ und wo ihre echten St√§rken liegen вЬЕ Trading als Handwerk: Was es wirklich braucht (Spoiler: Geduld und viel Lernen) вЬЕ Blockchain im Alltag: Vom Konzertticket √Љber die Immobilie bis zur R√Љckverfolgbarkeit von Kaffee вЬЕ Glaubenss√§tze ums Geld вАУ und wie man sie aufl√ґst вЬЕ Pers√ґnlichkeitsentwicklung als вАЮEndgegner" beim Trading вЬЕ Warum 1977 ein Schl√Љsseljahr f√Љr finanzielle Selbstbestimmung war вЬЕ Vorbild f√Љr die eigenen T√ґchter sein вАУ und f√Љr andere Frauen

рЯТђ Zitat der Folge: вАЮBitcoin ist ein absolut genialer Wertspeicher, der mich maximal flexibel und unabh√§ngig sein l√§sst."рЯУ≤ Marie von Bose findet ihr hier:рЯФЧ Instagram: @cryptosaloon.techвЬ® Unser Ziel: Bitcoin verst√§ndlich und greifbar machen durch Geschichten, die jeder nachvollziehen kann und die zeigen, dass die ersten Schritte nicht gro√Я sein m√Љssen und dass jeder Zweifel am Anfang hatte. Gef√§llt dir die Folge?Dann lass ein рЯСН da, abonniere den Kanal und schick die Episode an jemanden, der das h√ґren sollte рЯЪАрЯУМ Schreib deine Fragen/Meinungen in die Kommentare вАУ wir lesen alles!вЪ° Unterst√Љtze den Podcast √Љber Fountain: Auf Fountain kannst du die Audio-Version h√ґren und mir freiwillig Sats per Lightning senden вАУ ganz ohne Werbung oder Abo. рЯСЙ https://fountain.fm/show/WdHajypwLY2JOQN2zH1SрЯУ≤ Folge uns auf Instagram: рЯФЧ IG J√Љrgen: https://www.instagram.com/finanz.bewusstsein Rechtlicher Hinweis / Disclaimer:Die Inhalte dieses Podcasts dienen ausschlie√Яlich der finanziellen Bildung, der allgemeinen Information und zur pers√ґnlichen Meinungs√§u√Яerung. Sie stellen keine Finanz- oder Anlageberatung im Sinne einschl√§giger Vorschriften dar.Alle dargestellten Inhalte spiegeln ausschlie√Яlich pers√ґnliche Einsch√§tzungen wider. Jede Zuh√ґrerin und jeder Zuh√ґrer handelt eigenverantwortlich und tr√§gt die volle Verantwortung f√Љr eigene Investitionsentscheidungen.Bitte beachte: Bitcoin ist volatil und Investitionen k√ґnnen zu Verlusten f√Љhren.Informiere dich umfassend und bilde dir eine eigene Meinung, bevor du finanzielle Entscheidungen triffst.Ein zentraler Grundsatz lautet: Study Bitcoin.Partner:рЯІ°Bitcoin21 вАУ stylische Bitcoin Kleidung:Mit dem Code FINANZB bekommst du 10 % Rabatt auf deine gesamte Bestellung. https://bitcoin21.shop/?ref=FINANZB рЯІ°Coinfinity вАУ Bitcoin B√ґrse :https://coinfinity.co/bitcoin-appCode: FINANZB - Damit sparst du 21 % deiner Geb√Љhren in den ersten 6 Monaten.рЯІ°21statues вАУ Bitcoin Lampen und Statuen:https://21statues.de?sca_ref=10285598.SH2VZ7SHVa8Code: FINANZB - Du sparst 5 % auf alle ProdukteWeitere Empfehlungen und Codes:рЯІ°BitBox вАУ Cold Wallet:https://shop.bitbox.swiss/?ref=tfjnborqCode: FINANZB - Du sparst 5 % auf alle ProdukteрЯІ°Seedor вАУ Backup-L√ґsung in Stahl:https://www.seedor.io/discount/FINANZB Code: FINANZB - Du sparst 5 % auf alle ProdukteрЯІ°21Bitcoin вАУ Bitcoin B√ґrse: https://21bitcoin.app.link/invite/?code=LEBENMITBITCOINCode: LEBENMITBITCOIN - Damit sparst du bis zu 21 % deiner Geb√Љhren.

item.title: The Mustard Seed Bitcoin Podcast вАУ After the AI Buildout, the AI Economy Will Run on Bitcoin Collateral | Eric Jackson
item.description:
Eric Jackson joins Joe Burnett to explain why he believes bitcoin could reach $50 million as AI agents transform global commerce and demand pristine digital collateral. They also discuss bitcoinвАЩs recent underperformance, AI-powered market models, compounding through volatility, and why the next five years may be the most uncertain investing environment of our lifetimes.


Timestamps:

0:00 - Eric JacksonвАЩs background in markets

2:14 - Finding Carvana before the comeback

3:01 - The OpenDoor trade and retail investor momentum

3:40 - How Eric got interested in bitcoin and crypto

6:26 - Building AI models before ChatGPT

9:23 - Volatility, conviction, and long-term investing

12:16 - Why Eric thinks bitcoin could reach $50 million

17:01 - Bitcoin as the вАЬother coinвАЭ of the AI trade

20:16 - Is the AI boom propping up the market?

40:27 - Compounding through bitcoin volatility

43:35 - Can markets be predicted with enough data?

50:44 - Event Horizon IQ and AI-powered predictions

54:15 - Final thoughts and where to follow Eric

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin Archive w Archie вАУ How Banks Make You A Debt Slaves | Helena Andrejko
item.description:
How does a broken monetary system shape the way we think?

Helena Andrejko explores the hidden psychological effects of fiat money. Drawing on trauma psychology, monetary systems can mirror abusive relationships, conditioning people to accept surveillance, and financial insecurity as normal.


вЪ†пЄП If money shapes behaviour, then changing the money may change far more than markets.

Today, we dive into IRENвАЩs new stock awards to its co-CEOs, valued at $700 million at the time of publication, Anthropic reportedly tapping Samsung to build a custom AI chip, and Nvidia standing up a new program to finance neocloud GPU purchases in exchange for revenue sharing. For todayвАЩs interview, Jay Patel of Lygos Finance joins us to discuss the cracks showing in tech private credit and whether or not Strategy and Strive are out of the woods after their preferred share selloffs.¬†

Check out Dimetrics, the AI industryвАЩs Bloomberg terminal. Track financial metrics and news for AI stocks, GPU rental prices, state-by-state data center pushback, and more with the compute industryвАЩs most powerful dashboard.

item.title: The Peter McCormack Show вАУ #190 - Sam Lyman - ChinaвАЩs Secret War on American AI
item.description:
Sam Lyman joins me to discuss how China is allegedly targeting AmericaвАЩs AI buildout, the activist networks fighting data centres and why the race for AI infrastructure has become a national security battle.


Sam explains how Chinese influence campaigns, open-source AI models, data centre protests and far-left activist groups may be working together to slow the United States down. We discuss Neville Roy Singham, Code Pink, the Party for Socialism and Liberation, foreign influence, anti-data centre campaigns, and how billions of dollars in AI infrastructure have reportedly been delayed or blocked.


We also get into open-source AI, DeepSeek, US frontier models, Anthropic, AI export controls, whether AI doom narratives are being used to build regulatory moats, the risk of superintelligence, data centre moratoriums, socialism in America and why Sam believes the battle is now between Chinese AI and American AI.


- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

item.title: Rob Wallace | Bitcoin News вАУ "Companies Won't Need People" вАФ The AI Blackpill No One Is Ready To Hear | Fernando Nikolic
item.description:
You have roughly 18 months before AI permanently separates the builders from everyone else. Fernando Nikolic, former VP at Blockstream and now a profitable AI solo founder, says most people including most Bitcoiners are going to end up on the wrong side of that line.

In this conversation we get into the permanent underclass, the dying Bitcoin culture, the chaos gap we are all living through, and the forensic analysis Fernando ran using 17 AI sub-agents through five years of Michael Saylor's public communications that found something deeply disturbing about how the STRC launch was engineered.

Here is what we cover:

вАҐ What the permanent underclass actually means and why you only have 18 months to escape it

вАҐ What it is like to run a fully profitable business where all your employees are AI agents

вАҐ Why AI psychosis is real and how Fernando pulled himself back from the edge of it

вАҐ Why taste and voice are the last human advantages that AI cannot replicate

вАҐ How the Gutenberg printing press, Bitcoin, and AI are all doing the exact same thing to different institutions

вАҐ Why AI is homogenizing the web and what that means for anyone trying to build a brand

вАҐ The forensic analysis of five years of Saylor's communications and what it reveals about how STRC was engineered

вАҐ Why Strategy selling 700 Bitcoin in 2022 moved markets less than selling 32 Bitcoin in 2026

вАҐ What Perception is, what it does, and how companies are already using it to track narrative shifts in real time

вАҐ Why BIP-110 is failing to break out of the Bitcoin echo chamber and what it would take to change that

вАҐ Why this bear market has the worst memes and most uninspired content of any bear market Fernando can remember

вАҐ Why the Bitcoin and AI symbiosis is the only narrative that can drive the next wave of real adoption

SPONSORS

рЯЯ£ Download the Rhino App рЯСЙ https://rhinobitcoin.onelink.me/66Ka/bnews

Use Promo Code: "BITCOINNEWS" for $10 of FREE Bitcoin

рЯФі Subscribe to our newsletter Bitcoin News Weekly [FREE]рЯСЙ https://bitcoinnews.com/subscribe

]]>

item.title: Der Bitcoin Kompass: Wegweiser im Kaninchenbau вАУ Folge 5: Der Bitcoin-Preis вАУ Zwischen Angebot, Nachfrage und Geldpolitik
item.description:
Was bestimmt eigentlich den Bitcoin-Preis? In Folge 5 vom Bitcoin-Kompass sprechen wir √Љeber eines der meistdiskutierten Themen im Bitcoin-Space: den Preis. Dabei geht es nicht um Prognosen oder Kaufempfehlungen, sondern um ein grundlegendes Verst√§ndnis daf√Љer, wie der Bitcoin-Preis entsteht und welche Kraefte ihn beeinflussen.


Wir erkl√§ren, wie Angebot und Nachfrage auf Bitcoin-B√ґrsen funktionieren, warum das Handelsvolumen oft wichtiger ist als der Preis selbst und welche Rolle die Marktkapitalisierung spielt. Ausserdem beleuchten wir die grossen Einflussfaktoren: das Bitcoin-Halving und den Vier-Jahres-Zyklus, die Geldpolitik der US-Notenbank (Fed), Inflation und die wachsenden Staatsschulden der USA. Im Vergleich zwischen Bitcoin und Gold zeigen sie, warum Bitcoin technologisch ueberlegen sein k√ґnnte - und warum der Preis letztlich ein Spiegel des wachsenden Vertrauens in diese neue Technologie ist.


Mehr Infos, interaktive Grafiken zur Marktkapitalisierung und Kontaktmoeglichkeiten findet ihr auf:


Webseite: https://derbitcoinkompass.ch

E-Mail: kontakt@derbitcoinkompass.ch

Telegram: https://t.me/btc_kaninchenbau


Feedback und Fragen gerne per E-Mail, ueber Telegram oder ueber unsere Webseite.



(00:00:00) Begruessung & Einfuehrung ins Thema Preis

(00:01:31) Volatilitaet und der aktuelle Bitcoin-Preis

(00:02:33) Kaufkraft, Inflation und warum Menschen investieren

(00:05:20) Marktkapitalisierung: Bitcoin vs. Gold vs. Immobilien vs. Aktien

(00:08:05) Wie entsteht der Bitcoin-Preis? Angebot & Nachfrage erklaert

(00:11:04) Warum das Handelsvolumen entscheidend ist

(00:12:43) Die grossen Einflussfaktoren auf den Bitcoin-Preis

(00:13:26) In was messen wir den Preis? Euro, Dollar oder Aepfel?

(00:17:03) Warum Geld kein stabiler Massstab ist

(00:18:10) Bitcoins festes Angebot: Maximal 21 Millionen

(00:20:02) Das Halving und der Vier-Jahres-Zyklus

(00:24:22) Die Fed, Zinspolitik und US-Staatsschulden

(00:31:27) Was bedeutet das alles fuer den Bitcoin-Preis?

(00:33:37) Bitcoin vs. Gold: Vorteile und Unterschiede

(00:40:30) Preisprognose: Bitcoin auf 1 Million Dollar?

(00:41:54) Zusammenfassung & Verabschiedung

]]>

item.title: The Bitcoin Standard Podcast вАУ 332. Principles of Economics Lecture 17: Defense
item.description:
Lecture 17 of Principles of Economics explores the economics of defense as a market good rather than a uniquely governmental function, how law and order emerge through voluntary provision, the failure modes inherent of the state's monopoly over defense & law, and what a free market in defense would look like.

Get all course notes and slides on https://saifedean.com/poecourse

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin And | Bitcoin & Economic News вАУ Mycorhizae | Bitcoin And Revisited
item.description:
Today I replay an early Bitcoin And episode on signed Bitcoin transactions over Morse code, radio as a peripheral Bitcoin network, mycorrhizal fungi, soil intelligence, plant communication, and the strange way natural systems keep rhyming with digital networks. 
This one connects Bitcoin, permaculture, mushrooms, mycelium, commerce, information flow, and the very stubborn reality that useful networks route around damage. 


Topics for today: 
  •  Bitcoin price and shitcoin recovery 
  •  Signed Bitcoin transactions 
  •  Morse code and radio transmission 
  •  Bitcoin without direct internet access 
  •  Peripheral networks and resilience

item.title: Bitcoin Policy Institute вАУ Spotlight Series Ep. 2: Rep. Nick Begich
item.description:
Rep. Nick Begich (R-AK) reached Congress by an unusual route: founding software companies and holding Bitcoin since 2013. BPI's David Zell sat down with him at PubKey to talk about how a builder's instincts shape the way he legislates, his bill to give the U.S. a strategic Bitcoin reserve, and the policy questions AI is raising faster than Washington can answer them.


The conversation runs from Begich's 440 coins on Mt. Gox, to the American Reserve Modernization Act (ARMA), the ~93-year cycle of global reserve currencies, the "untethering" of money from scarcity, and why he believes AI's hardest problem is the "disintermediation of purpose" rather than unemployment. They close on UBI, Alaska's Permanent Fund as a model of citizen ownership, and what's next for the budget and healthcare.


Guest: Rep. Nick Begich (R-AK)

Host: David Zell, Bitcoin Policy Institute

Recorded at PubKey


CHAPTERS

0:00 Intro: A Founder Comes to Congress

1:21 From Baylor to Ford to Building a Software Company

5:17 Finding Bitcoin in 2013 & Surviving Mt. Gox

6:44 The Founder's Mindset vs. the Zero-Sum Worldview

13:56 ARMA: The Case for a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve

19:25 The "Untethering Event": Scarcity, Inflation & the Debt Spiral

25:58 AI's Promise, Peril & the "Disintermediation of Purpose"

31:59 Open-Source AI, China & Catastrophic Misuse Risk

39:14 Drawing the Regulatory Line & the "Bitcoin of AI"

42:25 UBI vs. Alaska's Permanent Fund: "Universal Basic Investment"

49:43 What's Next: The Budget, Healthcare & Quantum


#Bitcoin #BitcoinPolicy #ARMA #NickBegich #AIPolicy #DigitalAssets #StrategicBitcoinReserve #BPI #Crypto #MonetaryPolicy

]]>

item.title: The Bitcoin Layer вАУ This is the Most Bitcoin I Have Ever Bought
item.description: <![CDATA[In this global macro update, Nik asks whether bitcoin has finally bottomed after tagging 58k and reclaiming 60,000. He walks through the bullish divergences forming on bitcoin's daily and weekly charts, why a grinding-higher dollar has been weighing on liquidity and bitcoin all year, and why he now sees Asia, particularly yen and Korean won weakness, as the most likely spot for trouble. Nik also covers new Fed chair Kevin Warsh and his read that Warsh is playing junior to Scott Bessent on taming volatility, the state of Michael Saylor's STRC dividend and MSTR, and what TBL liquidity is signaling now]]>

item.title: Bitcoiners - Live From Bitcoin Beach вАУ Arrested and Debanked in Germany, Free in El Salvador: A Warning to Every Bitcoin Maxi in Europe | Michael Ballweg
item.description:
What if the government used debanking and digital surveillance to silence you? Michael Ballweg (@Michael_Ballweg), founder of Querdenken, rebuilt on a Bitcoin standard in El Salvador and is now fighting for local AI and data sovereignty while Europe tightens its grip on free speech and privacy protection.

Michael took a 180-person rally in Stuttgart and grew it into 1.3 million people in Berlin with Robert Kennedy Jr. on stage, all under the banner of free speech and the right to peacefully assemble. The German government responded by sending the Verfassungsschutz, Germany's constitutional protection agency, to monitor him, label him an extremist, and eventually raid his home on fraud charges that prosecutors spent years trying to make stick.

What followed was nine months in Stammheim prison, the same facility built for RAF terrorists in the 1970s, with no finalized charge, no bank account, no house, and no company infrastructure left standing. Full debanking meant living on cash and Bitcoin for nearly four years, and that forced experiment turned Michael into one of the most practically tested voices alive on what government overreach actually costs when it targets someone who keeps saying no.

After a 44-day trial and a complete acquittal on every meaningful charge, Michael and his wife landed in El Salvador and never looked back. Living on a Bitcoin standard here means a 12-cent transaction that clears in 10 minutes with nobody's permission required, and that experience makes the old banking system feel less like a convenience and more like a leash he's glad to have cut.

His focus now sits at the intersection of privacy protection and decentralized technology, watching centralized AI absorb the same power Big Tech used to capture the open internet in the 1990s. He's building with local AI tools that keep data out of corporate servers, using privacy-first devices for his Bitcoin stack, and watching Europe quietly roll out mandatory digital ID while most people are still arguing about whether any of it matters.


вАФBitcoin Beach Team


Learn more about Michael Ballweg:
X: https://x.com/michael_ballweg
Web: https://michael-ballweg.de/en/
Web: https://digitaler-aktivist.org/
Patreon: https://presse.querdenken-711.de/en/home/


Support and follow Bitcoin Beach:
X: https://www.twitter.com/BitcoinBeach¬†
IG: https://www.instagram.com/bitcoinbeach_sv¬†
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@livefrombitcoinbeach
Web: https://www.bitcoinbeach.com¬†


Browse through this quick guide to learn more about the episode:
0:00 Intro
1:23 Who is Michael Ballweg and what is the Querdenken movement?
5:10 Did European governments coordinate COVID protest bans?
6:27 How did Querdenken grow to 1.3 million people in Berlin with RFK Jr.?
13:18 Why was a German protest organizer arrested for money laundering and fraud?
19:41 What happens to your assets when the German government raids your home?
26:13 How did Michael Ballweg win acquittal after nine months in Stammheim prison?
34:07 Why are Bitcoiners leaving Europe and moving to El Salvador?
38:51 How do you live on a Bitcoin standard when banks refuse to open your account?
43:47 Is centralized AI the next big censorship threat after social media?¬†

Live From Bitcoin Beach

]]>

item.title: M√Љnzweg - der Bitcoin-Podcast вАУ M√Љnzgasse #71 Auf der Suche nach Magic Internet Money (mit Jan-Paul, Lightrider & Lawrence)
item.description:
Manu hat in letzter Zeit viel erlebt, viel beobachtet вАУ und noch mehr Fragen im Kopf. Taugt Bitcoin wirklich als Zahlungsmittel im Alltag? Nicht als Theorie, nicht als Wunschdenken, sondern da drau√Яen, wo echte Menschen echtes Geld ausgeben?

F√Љr die letzte M√Љnzgasse vor der Sommerpause hat er sich deshalb drei G√§ste eingeladen, die diese Frage nicht aus dem Lehrbuch beantworten вАУ sondern aus dem Maschinenraum. Jan-Paul von Bitrefill, Lightrider von Nadanada und Lawrence von Shopinbit sitzen t√§glich mitten drin. Sie sehen die Zahlen, sie sp√Љren die Trends, und sie reden heute ungewohnt offen dar√Љber, was wirklich passiert, welches Geld ihre Kunden bevorzugen.

Diese Folge ist kein Hype, kein Bashing вАУ sie ist ein ehrlicher Blick auf den Stand der Dinge. Mit drei Unternehmen, die f√Љr sich selbst sprechen k√ґnnen, weil sie den Beweis tagt√§glich antreten m√Љssen.

Perfekt f√Љr alle, die weniger reden und mehr wissen wollen.

Einen sch√ґnen Sommer вАУ und bis nach der Pause.

item.title: Store of Bitcoin - Bitcoin as Store of Value вАУ Ep. 49 - Daniel Batten | A new different wave of Bitcoin Adopters.
item.description:
In this episode of Store of Bitcoin, host Alessandro Ottaviani welcomes Daniel Batten, a prominent Bitcoin analyst and investor, to discuss the evolving narrative surrounding Bitcoin, particularly in relation to energy consumption and environmental impact. Daniel shares insights on how the mainstream media's perception of Bitcoin has shifted from skepticism to a more favorable view, largely due to rigorous research and advocacy from the Bitcoin community. He emphasizes the importance of effectively communicating Bitcoin's benefits to various stakeholders, including policymakers and investors, to foster broader adoption.

The conversation delves into the challenges of reaching new adopters, particularly those who may not be motivated by the same values that initially attracted early Bitcoin enthusiasts. Daniel highlights the need for a more nuanced approach to education and outreach, focusing on the social and environmental benefits of Bitcoin. He also discusses the potential for Bitcoin to serve as a tool for financial inclusion in developing countries, where it can provide a safeguard against inflation and empower individuals in oppressive regimes. The episode concludes with a look at future trends in Bitcoin adoption and the importance of aligning messaging with the values of diverse audiences.

This episode is sponsored by вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†BitVaultвБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†, the new open-source & self-custody wallet utilizing time-delays and multisignature to offset physical attacks and hacks.

item.itunes:summary:
In this episode of Store of Bitcoin, host Alessandro Ottaviani welcomes Daniel Batten, a prominent Bitcoin analyst and investor, to discuss the evolving narrative surrounding Bitcoin, particularly in relation to energy consumption and environmental impact. Daniel shares insights on how the mainstream media's perception of Bitcoin has shifted from skepticism to a more favorable view, largely due to rigorous research and advocacy from the Bitcoin community. He emphasizes the importance of effectively communicating Bitcoin's benefits to various stakeholders, including policymakers and investors, to foster broader adoption.

The conversation delves into the challenges of reaching new adopters, particularly those who may not be motivated by the same values that initially attracted early Bitcoin enthusiasts. Daniel highlights the need for a more nuanced approach to education and outreach, focusing on the social and environmental benefits of Bitcoin. He also discusses the potential for Bitcoin to serve as a tool for financial inclusion in developing countries, where it can provide a safeguard against inflation and empower individuals in oppressive regimes. The episode concludes with a look at future trends in Bitcoin adoption and the importance of aligning messaging with the values of diverse audiences.

This episode is sponsored by вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†BitVaultвБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†, the new open-source & self-custody wallet utilizing time-delays and multisignature to offset physical attacks and hacks.

item.title: The Bitcoin Infinity Show вАУ Dr. Jack Kruse Uncensored | BIS #209
item.description:
Dr. Jack Kruse joins the Bitcoin Infinity Show for an uncensored conversation, after Natalie Brunell declined to release his appearance on her podcast. He lays out his Fabianism thesis, the idea that the same incremental "Landauer attack" he believes centralized Western medicine through the Flexner Report is now being run against Bitcoin to turn it from money into mere digital gold. Knut and Jack go deep on BIP-110, spam and UTXO bloat, ossification, node sovereignty as Bitcoin's immune system, Austrian economics, self-custody, and the El Salvador and Bukele decentralized medicine law, with Jack arguing that node runners, not miners or core developers, are the ones who decide what Bitcoin becomes.

Watch Dr. Jack Kruse's BTC Prague talk first for full context: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=poCzB_D3VQA

Connect with Dr. Jack Kruse:

https://x.com/DrJackKruse

Connect with Us:

https://www.bitcoininfinityshow.com/

https://bitcoininfinitystore.com

https://primal.net/infinity

https://primal.net/knut

https://primal.net/luke

https://twitter.com/BtcInfinityShow

https://twitter.com/knutsvanholm

https://twitter.com/lukedewolf

Thanks to our sponsors - check out their websites for info:

item.title: Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock'n'Roll вАУ Episode 400 Jubilee: Our 7-Year Journey and Live Insights from PZF 2026
item.description:
400 episodes. Seven years. One podcast tracking the transformation of money from the front row.

In this milestone episode of Bitcoin, Fiat & RockвАЩnвАЩRoll, Michael Blaschke, Manuel Klein, Jonas Gross, Stefan Grasmann and Jonathan Knoll look back on a journey that began in 2019 as a German-language experiment and evolved into a global platform for digital money, tokenization, institutional DLT and the architecture of finance.

The team reflects on the guests, debates and turning points that shaped BFRR: from Libra and the rise of CBDCs to MiCA, stablecoins, tokenized deposits, DeFi and the move from experimentation toward institutional adoption. They revisit memorable conversations, discuss what they got rightвАФand where timing proved harder to predictвАФand share what seven years of weekly publishing have taught them about technology, regulation and financial infrastructure.

The second half takes listeners to the Point Zero Forum 2026 in Zurich, where BFRR served as an official media partner. The team shares its takeaways and brings together voices from finance, technology and policy around three questions: What was the most important idea at the conference? What surprised people or changed their minds? And what crucial topic is still missing from the conversation?

The answers reveal an industry entering a new phase. Interoperability is increasingly a governance challenge, not merely a technical one. Stablecoins, tokenized deposits and central bank money may coexist rather than compete. Agentic payments are raising urgent questions around liability and identity. Post-quantum security is moving from a distant concern to a concrete deadline. Across the board, the focus is shifting from proofs of concept to production, scale and real economic use cases.

Episode 400 is both a celebration and a reality check: progress has been slower than many expected, but the direction of travel is clearer than ever. The debate is no longer whether institutions will adopt digital assets and DLT, but how fast, on which infrastructure and under whose rules.

Bitcoin, Fiat & RockвАЩnвАЩRoll Website Bitcoin, Fiat & RockвАЩnвАЩRoll Telegram Channel Inside the ECBвАЩ s Digital Euro Project and Stablecoins with Ulrich Bindseil From Libra to Legitimacy: CircleвАЩs Stablecoin R(e)volution From Citi Bank to Stablecoins: Tony McLaughlin's Bold Pivot Reclaiming Digital Sovereignty in Europe - and the Role of the Digital Euro Permissionless blockchains for financial services A journey through the era of digital money with Rod Garratt [US vs EU: The Stablecoin Policy Divide]x(https://open.spotify.com/episode/7D5r1pOxLf31tQDocCiTQi?si=kEZ1yZ7IRIm-bZWh0dx3LA))

Relai*: Buy Bitcoin with RelaiвАФyou can do a one-time purchase or savings plan: Click here. Use the referral code "ROCK" to reduce transaction fees by 0.1% while supporting Bitcoin, Fiat & RockвАЩnвАЩRoll.

Value4Value Podcast Streaming: Support our podcast by listening to our episodes on the Fountain Podcast App. This way, if you wish, you can support us "Value4Value" while listening to the podcast. You can find us on the Fountain Podcast App here: Click here

Disclaimer: The content of this podcast reflects the private opinions of the hosts, serves exclusively for general information purposes and does not constitute investment advice. Always remember: Do your own researchвАФinform yourself before making any investment decisions, such as buying Bitcoin. First try to understand what Bitcoin is and how to store it. This podcast does not provide financial advice. Note that the co-hosts might be invested in crypto assets. Read more on our website: Click here

All links marked with "*" are affiliate links. If you use these links for purchase, the podcast receives a small share of the revenue without any additional costs to you. On the contrary, affiliate links often include discount promotions, so you can even save money. We would appreciate it if you use these links to support us. Thank you very much!

item.title: House of Satoshi - Bitcoin und Friends вАУ #60 Bitcoin als Lebenseinstellung - mit dem Bitcoin-Banker Pascal Eberle
item.description:
*** Werbung: PostFinance Krypto Newsletter ***

Der Krypto-Markt schl√§ft nie. Jede Woche passiert etwas Neues rund um Bitcoin, Ethereum und Co. Der monatliche Newsletter von PostFinance ordnet die wichtigsten Entwicklungen kompakt ein, damit du den √Ьberblick beh√§ltst, ohne lange zu suchen. Abonnieren direkt im E-Finance oder hier: Krypto-Newsletter abonnieren | PostFinance

https://www.postfinance.ch/de/privat/anlegen/moeglichkeiten/krypto/newsletter-abonnieren.html#/category?groupId=newsletter_krypto

***

Bitcoin als Lebenseinstellung, der Markt im Tief und die Bitcoinisierung der Finanzwelt

Rino Borini spricht mit Pascal Eberle, Chief of Staff bei Sygnum Bank und Co-Lead von Bitcoin at Sygnum, √Љber Proof of Work als Alltagsprinzip, das blutende Preisschild bei starkem Fundament und die Produktwelt einer Digital Asset Bank.

Die Kernthemen:

  • Bitcoin-Prinzipien wie tiefe Zeitpr√§ferenz und stay humble, stack sats wirken weit √Љber die Wallet hinaus, bis in Sport, Sparen und Familie.
  • Bei knapp 60'000 Dollar sieht der Preis schlecht aus, doch institutionelle Adoption und Netzwerksicherheit waren laut Eberle noch nie so stark.
  • Geld funktioniert in Schichten: Bitcoin ist der sichere Base Layer, Lightning erledigen den Alltag.
  • Von Verwahrung √Љber Transfer und Lending bis zu Bitcoin-Hypotheken: wie Banken die Bitcoinisierung umsetzen.

Im Talk erw√§hnt:

  • Nick Bhatia, Layered Money (Buch)
  • Jeff Booth, The Price of Tomorrow (Buch)
  • Douglas Adams, The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy (Buch)
  • Gigi, "Bitcoin is Time" (Essay, dergigi.com)

Abonniere den House of Satoshi Newsletter f√Љr monatliche Bitcoin-Insights. http://www.house-of-satoshi.ch/newsletter


--------------------------------

Disclaimer: Dieser Inhalt dient der Information und Bildung und ist keine Anlage-, Steuer- oder Rechtsberatung. Bitcoin und Krypto sind volatil, du kannst dein eingesetztes Kapital verlieren. Mach deine eigene Recherche und entscheide selbst.

item.title: Coin Stories with Natalie Brunell вАУ Mauricio Di Bartolomeo: Gold vs. Bitcoin Credit, the $40K Bitcoin Debate and Ledn's S&P Bitcoin Bond
item.description:
Ledn Co-Founder Mauricio Di Bartolomeo joins Natalie Brunell for a first-time announcement: Tether's tokenized gold (XAUt) is coming to Ledn вАФ the first step toward gold-backed loans later this year.

He answers the Bitcoin purists on adding gold, breaks down Ledn's first S&P investment-grade bond backed by Bitcoin loans, and gives a firsthand account of Venezuela after Maduro's capture.

Topics we cover:

  • XAUt tokenized gold (real bars in Tether's Swiss vaults) coming to Ledn, with gold-backed loans later this year
  • Inside Ledn's first S&P investment-grade bond backed by Bitcoin loans вАФ and how the ABS market could scale Bitcoin credit toward $1 trillion
  • Mauricio's answer to Bitcoiners who don't like credit products or investing in other assets
  • Natalie's experience taking her first Ledn loan: https://youtu.be/xD3ZoZ2woPk?si=ix0HKnD85hqMTokU
  • Why Ledn caps loans at 50% LTV, and how auto top-off protects borrowers from liquidation
  • His read on "seller exhaustion" and why he expects a summer price come-back
  • Venezuela after Maduro's capture вАФ and the crackdown on its illegal gold mines

Follow Mauricio Di Bartolomeo on X https://x.com/cryptonomista and sign up for Ledn at ledn.io/natalie to get .25% off your first loan.

----

Order Natalie's new book "Bitcoin is For Everyone," a simple introduction to Bitcoin and what's broken in our current financial system: https://amzn.to/3WzFzfU

----

Have you downloaded SPEED WALLET yet? It's my go-to Lightning wallet вАФ send, receive, and swap Bitcoin, stablecoins, and digital gold in one app. Run a business? Speed powers Bitcoin payments for Steak 'n Shake, and it can do the same for you. Download at www.speed.app/natalie and use code COINSTORIES10 for 5,000 free sats after your first transaction.

----

Ledn is the global leader in Bitcoin-backed loans, issuing over $10 billion in loans since 2018, and they were the first to offer proof of reserves. With Ledn, you get custody loans, no credit checks, no monthly payments, and more. Get .25% off your first loan, learn more at https://www.Ledn.io/natalie

----

Abundant Mines is a fully-managed Bitcoin mining in the U.S. You own the miners. You keep 100% of the Bitcoin. Voted #1 mining company by peers. Get 1 month of free hosting: AbundantMines.com/Natalie

----

Natalie's Bitcoin Product Partners:

  • Block's Bitkey Cold Storage Wallet was named to TIME's prestigious Best Inventions of 2024 in the category of Privacy & Security. Get 10% off using code STORIES at https://bitkey.world/STORIES
  • Master your Bitcoin self-custody with 1-on-1 help and gain peace of mind with the help of The Bitcoin Way: https://www.thebitcoinway.com/natalie
  • With BitcoinIRA, you can invest in bitcoin 24/7 inside a tax-advantaged IRA. Choose a Traditional IRA to defer taxes, or a Roth IRA for tax-free withdrawals later. Take control of your future with BitcoinIRA: https://www.bitcoinira.com/natalie

----

Natalie's Upcoming Events:

  • Join us for the biggest Bitcoin conference in Europe at BTC Prague this June 10-13 with a keynote from Michael Saylor, Code HODL for discounted passes: https://btcprague.com/
  • The best time to plan for Bitcoin 2027 is right now. Early bird tickets are live вАФ grab the lowest pricing available and use code HODL for 10% off: https://tickets.b.tc/event/bitcoin-2027?promoCodeTask=apply&promoCodeInput=HODL

----

Extra Services to Consider:

  • Protect yourself from SIM Swaps that can hack your accounts and steal your Bitcoin. Join America's most secure mobile service, trusted by CEOs, VIPs and top corporations: https://www.efani.com/natalie
  • Ditch your fiat health insurance like I did four years ago! Join me at CrowdHealth: www.joincrowdhealth.com/natalie

----

This podcast is for educational purposes and should not be construed as official investment advice. Ads in this episode are baked-in and may reference promotions or offers that are no longer available at the time of listening.

----

VALUE FOR VALUE вАФ SUPPORT NATALIE'S SHOWS

  • Strike ID https://strike.me/coinstoriesnat/
  • Cash App $CoinStories

#money #Bitcoin #investing

  • His read on "seller exhaustion" and why he expects a summer price come-back
  • Venezuela after Maduro's capture вАФ and the crackdown on its illegal gold mines

----

Order Natalie's new book "Bitcoin is For Everyone," a simple introduction to Bitcoin and what's broken in our current financial system: https://amzn.to/3WzFzfU

----

Speed powers Bitcoin payments for Steak 'n Shake, and it can do the same for you. Download at www.speed.app/natalie and use code COINSTORIES10 for 5,000 free sats after your first transaction.

----

With Ledn, you get custody loans, no credit checks, no monthly payments, and more. Get .25% off your first loan, learn more at https://www.Ledn.io/natalie

----

----

AI agents are about to start using money.

Will they use Visa, stablecoinsвА¶ or Bitcoin?

Bitcoin developer Matt Corallo explains why AI could become BitcoinвАЩs biggest opportunityвАФor its biggest threat. From Lightning wallets and agentic payments to open-source AI, quantum computing, mining decentralization, and the future of money, this conversation explores what happens when machines become economic actors.

item.title: THE Bitcoin Podcast вАУ The Final War: Bitcoin Freedom vs. AI Communism | American Hodl & Erik Cason
item.description:
American Hodl and Erik Cason return to THE Bitcoin Podcast for a wide-ranging conversation on Bitcoin, AI, cryptography, surveillance, socialism / communism, and the future of human freedom.

We explore whether AI is fundamentally communist and centralizing, why Bitcoin may be one of humanityвАЩs greatest tools for preserving individual liberty, and how advances in AI are reshaping the economics of censorship, surveillance, and political power.

Along the way, we examine the resurgence of socialism and communism, AmericaвАЩs founding ideals, the growing crisis of trust in Western institutions, open-source AI, privacy, faith, family, and why building parallel systems may matter more than fighting over existing ones.

A philosophical, provocative, and often humorous conversation about the defining ideas shaping the future.

PARTNERS & DISCOUNTS:

  • LEDN: Bitcoin-backed lending. Go to ledn.io/walker and unlock liquidity WITHOUT selling your bitcoin.
  • BLOCKSTREAM JADE: BLOCKSTREAM JADE HARDWARE WALLET: Head to https://store.blockstream.com/ and use coupon code WALKER for 10% off!
  • BDICвДҐ is building an insurance marketplace on the bitcoin standard. Sign up for the waitlist at: http://bdic.io/walker
  • Own Bitcoin Miners. Keep 100% Of The Bitcoin. Get 1st month of free hosting with https://abundantmines.com/walker
  • Buy Bitcoin with River: http://partner.river.com/walker
  • GET FOLD ($10 in bitcoin): https://use.foldapp.com/r/WALKER

JOIN THE SUBSTACK TO GET NEW EPISODES DELIVERED STRAIGHT TO YOUR INBOX: https://walkeramerica.substack.com/

FOLLOW ERIK:

NOSTR: https://primal.net/erikcason

X: https://x.com/Erikcason

FOLLOW HODL:

NOSTR: https://primal.net/hodl

X: https://x.com/americanhodl8

If you enjoy THE Bitcoin Podcast you can help support the show by doing the following:

FOLLOW ME (Walker) on @WalkerAmerica on X | @TitcoinPodcast on X | Nostr Personal (walker) | Nostr Podcast (Titcoin) | Instagram

Subscribe to THE Bitcoin Podcast (and leave a review) on Fountain | YouTube | Spotify | Rumble | EVERYWHERE ELSE

]]>

item.title: Crypto Nerds Podcast - Krypto, Bitcoin, Web3 & Co. вАУ Uncut | Gr√Љne Woche, Trump verdient Milliarden und Clarity Act wackelt
item.description:
Diese Episode wird wie immer unterst√Љtzt von unserem Partner und Krypto-Broker Bison https://bit.ly/cryptonerds-bison

10 Euro BISON Gutschein (Code: BITCOIN10): https://bisonapp.com/gutschein/podcast

Jetzt Early Access sichern - Crypto Nerds Trading Lab Lerne Trading, teste Strategien mit Demogeld und nimm an Wettbewerben teil, komplett risikofrei. Jetzt kostenlos registrieren: https://tradinglab.cryptonerds.com/

Einordnung & √Ьberblick

Sascha ist nach der Geburt seines Kindes wieder dabei. Der Markt dreht erstmals seit Wochen ins Gr√Љne. Eric und Sascha ordnen alles n√Љchtern ein: Was hinter der Erholung steckt, warum Strategy jetzt offiziell Bitcoin verkaufen darf und was es bedeutet, dass Trump 2025 √Љber eine Milliarde Dollar aus Krypto eingenommen hat.

Themen dieser Woche

вАҐ Aufl√ґsung der Wette: Bitcoin war unter 60.000, Punkt geht an Sascha via Werner-Tipp

вАҐ Bitcoin bei 61.900 Dollar, plus 4 Prozent zur Vorwoche

вАҐ Ethereum plus 12 Prozent, Solana zwischenzeitlich plus 20 Prozent

вАҐ 200-Wochen-Moving-Average: historisch gutes Signal, aber kein blindes Kaufsignal

вАҐ 2022-Vergleich: nach dem Moving-Average-Unterschreiten noch lange darunter geblieben

вАҐ Sascha vorsichtig optimistisch, Eric eher skeptisch

вАҐ Bitcoin-ETF-Inflows: 223 Millionen Dollar, gr√ґ√Яter Tages-Inflow seit zwei Monaten

вАҐ Fidelity Bitcoin ETF erh√§lt den gr√ґ√Яten Anteil des Inflows

вАҐ 10 aufeinanderfolgende Outflow-Tage zuvor mit 1,5 bis 2 Milliarden Dollar Abfluss

вАҐ Europ√§ische ETF- und ETP-Anbieter senken Geb√Љhren wegen Preiskampf

вАҐ Strategy legt Verkaufs-Framework vor: bis 1,25 Milliarden Dollar erlaubt

вАҐ Erl√ґse nur f√Љr Cash-Reserve, Vorzugsdividenden, Zinszahlungen oder Aktienr√Љckkauf

вАҐ JP Morgan: Strategy ist ein Risiko f√Љr Bitcoin

вАҐ Strategy kauft seit √Љber einer Woche nicht mehr

вАҐ Warum Strategy beim Tiefpunkt 57.700 Dollar nicht zugekauft hat

вАҐ 20.000 bis 21.000 Bitcoin gest√Љckelt in den Markt: kein positives Signal

вАҐ Dezentralisierung als Falle: Saschas These

вАҐ Trump verdient 2025 laut Einkommenserkl√§rung √Љber eine Milliarde Dollar aus Krypto

вАҐ JD Vance: 300.000 bis 500.000 Dollar in Krypto

вАҐ Politische Einordnung: Missbrauch des Amts oder nothing illegal?

вАҐ FED-Meeting am 28./29. Juli: Zinserh√ґhung wahrscheinlicher werdend

вАҐ Polymarket: FED-Zinserh√ґhung Ende Jahr bei rund 48 Prozent, Juli nur 9 Prozent

вАҐ Clarity Act: 4.-Juli-Deadline verpasst, nur noch 40 Prozent auf Polymarket

вАҐ Zeitdruck: vor Sommerpause und vor den Midterms

вАҐ Binance: Lizenzantrag in Griechenland zur√Љckgezogen, neuer Plan in Frankreich

вАҐ Kunden in Frankreich, Italien, Spanien, Polen, Belgien, Schweden erhalten Mail

вАҐ Binance-Support sagt gleichzeitig: gar nicht von MiCA betroffen via Abu-Dhabi-Lizenz

вАҐ Regulierte Alternativen: Bison, Kraken, Bitwavo, OKX, Coinbase

вАҐ Jillian Lynch von Binance: Binance verl√§sst Europa nicht

вАҐ MediaMarkt Saturn verkauft Bitcoin via Krypto Now aus der Schweiz

вАҐ CONF3RENCE: Tag 2 kostenlos, Tag 1 via eToro-Partnerschaft

Moderation

Eric Heinemann вАУ @cryptonerds

Sascha R√ґhrer вАУ @CONF3RENCE

Community & Links

Crypto Nerds

Website: https://www.cryptonerds.com/

YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@cryptonerds

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/cryptonerds-com

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/cryptonerds_com/

X (Twitter): https://x.com/EricCryptoNerds

Partner & Bonus

Nutze unseren Partner BISON, den Krypto-Broker der B√ґrse Stuttgart:

10 Euro Bonus sichern bei Kontoer√ґffnung √Љber unseren Link und reguliert in Deutschland Krypto handeln.

Hinweis: Affiliate-Link, wir erhalten eine Provision, f√Љr dich entstehen keine zus√§tzlichen Kosten.

Diese Folge wird durch Werbung unserer Partner unterst√Љtzt, um unsere Arbeit m√ґglich zu machen. Insofern du einen Werbelink anklickst, kann es sein, dass wir hierf√Љr etwas von unserem Werbepartner erhalten.

]]>

item.title: BITCOIN & ALTCOINS вАУ Ruhe vor dem Sturm: Was die Krypto-Flaute wirklich bedeutet
item.description:
Bei Bitcoin und Altcoins macht sich derzeit eine Art Sommer-Lethargie breit. Kaum nennenswerte Bewegungen nach oben oder unten zehren an den Nerven der Anleger und sch√Љren ihre Ungeduld. Warum dieser gef√Љhlte Stillstand jedoch ein Vorbote f√Љr den n√§chsten Ausbruch sein k√ґnnte, wann sich ein Nachkauf lohnt und was in dieser Woche zu erwarten ist, verr√§t Oliver Michel (tokentus investment AG) in einer neuen Folge von вАЮBITCOIN & ALTCOINSвАЬ.

Hinweis: Die im Podcast besprochenen Coins und Token stellen keine spezifischen Kauf- oder Anlageempfehlungen dar. Die Moderatoren oder der Verlag haften nicht f√Љr etwaige Verluste, die aufgrund der Umsetzung der im Podcast diskutierten Gedanken oder Ideen entstehen.

Das Gespr√§ch wurde am 30.06.2026 an der Frankfurter B√ґrse aufgezeichnet.

T√§gliche Informationen gef√§llig? Dann ab zu вАЮKrypto-InsightsвАЬ вАУ dem Telegram-Kanal von Oliver Michel und Johanna Kr√§mer. Weitere Infos unter www.krypto-insights.de

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin News Alerts | Daily BTC Macro Signal вАУ 2388: $100T Bitcoin Breakthrough - The Opposition Just Collapsed
item.description:
Law enforcement opposition to the CLARITY Act just collapsed. One major organization publicly endorsed the bill, another moved from opposition to neutral, and Bloomberg Intelligence now says there's a 60% chance it passes this month.

Hundreds of trillions of dollars sit inside pensions, banks, insurance companies, sovereign wealth funds and global markets that need clear rules before capital can move. We examine the remaining roadblock, Senator Cynthia Lummis making the case for Bitcoin on the floor of Congress, and why Bitcoin only needs a fraction of the capital waiting behind that door.

рЯУЇ Prefer video? Watch daily Bitcoin breakdowns: http://BitcoinNewsAlerts.net

]]>

item.title: bitcoin ist - Wissen statt FOMO вАУ 18) ... Deflation f√Љr alle
item.description:
Warum schlagen √Цkonomen und Zentralbanken sofort Alarm, wenn sie das Wort вАЮDeflationвАЬ h√ґren? Sie warnen vor Wirtschaftskrisen, hoher Arbeitslosigkeit und dem Zusammenbruch der M√§rkte. Und in unserem aktuellen Finanzsystem haben sie damit sogar recht вАУ allerdings tun sie damit dem Begriff der Deflation unrecht.

In dieser Folge von вАЮbitcoin ist...вАЬ schauen wir uns den Begriff der Deflation genauer an. Denn es gibt zwei Arten von Deflation: Eine, die ein krankes System kollabieren l√§sst, und eine, die der absolute Normalzustand der menschlichen Zivilisation sein sollte.

  • Der "Fehler" im System: Warum unser schuldenbasiertes Geldsystem Angst vor sinkenden Preisen hat und warum Kredite niemals вАЮteurerвАЬ werden d√Љrfen.

  • Die gute Deflation: Wie der technologische Fortschritt (vom Rad bis zum Internet) unser Leben nat√Љrlicherweise immer effizienter und g√Љnstiger machen m√Љsste.

  • Das 2%-Mantra: Warum Zentralbanken die Geldmenge k√Љnstlich ausweiten, um den Produktivit√§tsgewinn deiner Lebenszeit unbemerkt abzusch√ґpfen.

  • Bitcoin als L√ґsung: Wie eine absolut begrenzte Geldmenge von 21 Millionen Einheiten daf√Љr sorgt, dass der menschliche Fortschritt endlich wieder direkt in deinem Geldbeutel landet.

вАЮDie Zentralbanken bek√§mpfen die schlechte Deflation, indem sie permanent Geld drucken. Doch damit zerst√ґren sie gleichzeitig die gute Deflation вАУ sie fressen den technologischen Fortschritt einfach auf und verw√§ssern unsere Kaufkraft schleichend.вАЬ

Alles von "bitcoin ist..." Hier geht es zu allen meinen Kan√§len: https://linktr.ee/bitcoinist

Einsteiger-Spezial: m√ґchtest du wissen, WIE man bitcoin sicher kauft und verwahrt? kostenlose und sichere Kaufanleitung direkt in dein Postfach

Hinterlasse mir gerne eine 5-Sterne-Bewertung oder einen Kommentar. Danke, Dein Christian.


]]>

вАЮDie Zentralbanken bek√§mpfen die schlechte Deflation, indem sie permanent Geld drucken. Doch damit zerst√ґren sie gleichzeitig die gute Deflation вАУ sie fressen den technologischen Fortschritt einfach auf und verw√§ssern unsere Kaufkraft schleichend.вАЬ

Alles von "bitcoin ist..." Hier geht es zu allen meinen Kan√§len: https://linktr.ee/bitcoinist
