item.title: Bitcoin Optech Podcast вАУ Bitcoin Optech: Newsletter #411 Recap
item.description:
Mark вАЬMurchвАЭ Erhardt, Gustavo Flores Echaiz, and Mike Schmidt are joined by Nishant Bansal and Matthew Zipkin to discuss¬†Newsletter #411.


News

вЧП LND zero-timestamp gossip DoS disclosure (1:00)


Selected Q&A from Bitcoin Stack Exchange

вЧП Is it a bug that `OP_IF` is part of the tapscript opcodes? (34:02)

вЧП Why would forbidding `OP_IF` in tapscript be a problem? (41:11)

вЧП Does a softfork always succeed? (49:17)

вЧП How to set up Bitcoin Core to mine a valid block after the BIP110 activation in August 2026? (56:44)

вЧП Are BIP110 blocks on a branch with lower difficulty valid? (59:47)

вЧП What is the story behind Bitcoin test networks? (1:07:41)

вЧП Why was `-datacarriersize` redefined in 2022, and why was the 2023 proposal to expand it not merged? (1:15:35)

вЧП Are chains of 26 unconfirmed transactions prohibited by the wallet in Bitcoin Core 31.0? (1:25:33)

вЧП Are there changes in Bitcoin Core 29.0 that affect memory usage? (1:28:20)

вЧП What is Bitcoin Core's release schedule? (1:30:21)


Releases and release candidates

вЧП LDK v0.1.10 (1:34:50)

вЧП LDK v0.2.3 (1:35:31)

вЧП BTCPay Server 2.4.0 (1:37:04)


Notable code and documentation changes

вЧП Bitcoin Core #35070 (1:39:27)

вЧП Bitcoin Core #35182 (13:15)

вЧП BIPs #2198 (1:46:09)

вЧП LDK #4713 (1:51:17)

вЧП LDK #4684 (1:53:47)


]]>

item.title: M√Љnzcrime - True Crime Bitcoin Podcast вАУ Unter Geldw√§scheverdacht Episode 6 (mit Plep4Fun)
item.description:
Konto gesperrt. Komplett. Kein √Ьberweisen, kein Abheben, kein gar nichts. Und das ohne Vorwarnung, ohne Erkl√§rung, einfach so. 


Genau das hat Pleb4Fun im Januar 2025 erwischt. Von einer Sekunde auf die andere war er raus aus dem System вАУ w√§hrend Rechnungen weiterhin kamen und das Leben sich nicht um sein Bankproblem scherte. 
Was dann folgte, war kein schneller Anruf mit happy ending. Es war ein b√Љrokratischer Alptraum, der eine viel unbequemere Frage aufwirft: Wie leicht ger√§t man heutzutage eigentlich ins Visier der Beh√ґrden, obwohl man absolut nichts falsch gemacht hat? 


Chefermittler Mavi hat sich mit Pleb4Fun zusammengesetzt und die ganze Geschichte auseinandergenommen вАУ akribisch, ehrlich und ohne Sch√ґnf√§rberei. Raus gekommen ist dabei eine Episode, die unter die Haut geht. Nicht weil sie rei√Яerisch ist, sondern weil es Realit√§t ist.


Geldw√§scheverdacht. Ein Begriff, den die meisten Menschen mit Kriminellen verbinden. Nicht mit jemandem, der einfach seinen Alltag lebt. 
Das hier ist keine abstrakte Diskussion √Љber Finanzgesetze. Das ist die Geschichte eines Menschen, der pl√ґtzlich beweisen musste, dass er kein Verbrecher ist вАУ und das Protokoll dazu liegt jetzt auf dem Tisch. 

Links zur Folge:
Pleb4Fun Dokumentation auf X

Ticketverkauf Event Brivat (Bitcoin Privacy Event)

Der Fall Samourai

V4V:
crime21@getalby.com

Nostr:

X:
https://x.com/Muenzcrime

E-Mail:
muenzcrime@tuta.io]]>

item.title: VERIFIED by Bitcoin Suisse вАУ The Clock Is Ticking on Bitcoin's Biggest Threat - Adam Back
item.description:
In 2008, before the genesis block existed, Satoshi Nakamoto emailed Adam Back the Bitcoin whitepaper - the same paper that cites Back's Hashcash as a building block for proof-of-work.Today Adam Back is co-founder and CEO of Blockstream and CEO of Bitcoin Standard Treasury Company (BSTR). He joins Bitcoin Suisse to trace Bitcoin's arc from a cypherpunk experiment to a reserve asset that sovereigns and institutions now compete for - and to confront the debate that could define its next decade: the race to make Bitcoin quantum-secure.

]]>

item.title: State of Bitcoin with Brandon Keys вАУ The European Bitcoin Ban Hiding In Plain Sight with Matyas Kuchar - State of Bitcoin Ep. 238
item.description:
Until last year, more than 1,000 restaurants in Czech Republic accepted Bitcoin. Then it all stopped.

The MiCA regulation didn't ban Bitcoin in Europe. It did something far more effective вАФ it made the rails impossible to operate. And as the Czech merchant economy quietly disappeared, two bigger forces started moving in the background: the petrodollar dying, and CBDCs coming online in Europe THIS YEAR.

In this episode, I sit down with Matyas Kuchar вАФ co-founder of BTC Prague, the largest Bitcoin-only conference in Europe, and one of the most thoughtful voices on European Bitcoin policy вАФ to break down why Czech Republic became the Bitcoin capital of Europe, why the European surveillance state is spreading faster than Americans realize, and why he believes Bitcoin must win because the alternative is just so much worse.

You'll learn:

вЖТ How MiCA quietly killed 1,000+ Bitcoin-accepting restaurants in Czech Republic вАФ and why it wasn't even a direct ban

вЖТ Why Czech Republic became the Bitcoin capital of Europe (Trezor, Slush Pool, BIP-39, General Bytes вАФ all started in Prague)

вЖТ Why the petrodollar is dying вАФ and what the loss of US hegemony means for global decentralization

вЖТ Why Europeans use Bitcoin as money while Americans treat it as digital gold вАФ and which approach is right

вЖТ The European CBDC threat: pilots are launching THIS YEAR вАФ and why most Americans haven't heard about it

вЖТ The CBDC mechanism in Matyas's words: "You can analyze, you can control, you can surveil, you can send from a helicopter"

вЖТ Why even an anarcho-capitalist now meets with politicians вАФ and what changed his mind

вЖТ Why Bitcoin is no longer just savings вАФ it's the network of people building the future you actually want to live in

рЯЪ® JOIN ME AT BTC PRAGUE 2026

The largest Bitcoin-only conference in Europe вАФ June 11-13. Use code GREENCANDLE for discounted tickets:

https://btcprague.com/

рЯОѓ PROTECT YOUR BITCOIN WITH SALT LENDING

Borrow against your Bitcoin without selling a single sat. Green Candle viewers get an exclusive offer:

https://saltlending.com/green-candle

рЯОѓ PLAN YOUR WEALTH WITH STRONG WEALTH

Build a Bitcoin-aligned wealth strategy вАФ estate planning, tax optimization, portfolio construction:

https://strongwealth.net/

рЯОѓ MINE BITCOIN WITH SIMPLE MINING

First-year repairs free for Green Candle listeners:

https://simplemining.io/green-candle

рЯУК REFERENCED IN THIS EPISODE

вАҐ MiCA regulation (EU 2023/1114) вАФ Markets in Crypto-Assets framework

вАҐ Czech Republic Bitcoin tax exemption (3-year hold rule)

вАҐ Slush Pool (founded 2010 in Prague, first ever Bitcoin mining pool)

вАҐ BIP-39 seed phrase standard (developed in Prague)

вАҐ Trezor hardware wallet (first ever, founded in Prague)

вАҐ EU CBDC pilot programs (launching 2026)

вАҐ BTC Prague 2026 conference вАФ June 11-13

Bitcoin #BTCPrague #Matyas #MiCA #BitcoinEurope #CBDC #BitcoinPolicy #EuropeanBitcoin #BitcoinConference #SoundMoney #Petrodollar #BitcoinAdoption #CzechRepublic #FinancialFreedom #BitcoinNews

рЯФФ SUBSCRIBE for weekly Bitcoin, macro, and personal finance content.

вЪ†пЄП Disclaimer: This video is for informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Always do your own research.

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin.com News Weekly Update вАУ Bitcoin Bear Market, ETH Cuts and World Cup Crypto Betting
item.description: <![CDATA[Is Bitcoin still in a bear market?In this episode of **The Weekly**, David Sencil and Graham Stone break down Bitcoin's prolonged move below its 200-day moving average, accelerating spot Bitcoin ETF outflows, and why Strategy's STRC structure continues to weigh on market sentiment.They also discuss the Ethereum Foundation's restructuring, the launch of Eth Labs, USDT briefly surpassing ETH by market cap, evolving stablecoin regulation, and how the 2026 FIFA World Cup is driving a surge in crypto-based prediction markets and sports betting.Whether you're following Bitcoin, Ethereum, stablecoins, macro trends, or crypto adoption, this episode covers the biggest stories shaping the market this week.рЯОІ Follow *The Weekly* on Spotify and turn on notifications so you never miss new episodes.Chapters:00:47 - Welcome back and episode overview01:23 - Bitcoin bear market and ETF outflows03:44 - BlackRock iBit and broader ETF pressure05:00 - Macro headwinds and Fed rate expectations07:41 - Bitcoin valuation and the power law mean08:17 - Dollar strength and Michael Saylor09:27 - Strategy, STRC, and dividend questions13:45 - Market skepticism and STRCвАЩs peg16:48 - Why some are turning constructive on MSTR17:27 - Ethereum Foundation restructuring19:25 - ETH Labs and EthereumвАЩs business focus22:48 - Stablecoins and USDT overtaking Ether24:16 - Bank of England backtracks on stablecoin limits26:08 - World Cup betting and crypto adoption31:11 - Bitcoin.com app and wrap-up]]>

item.title: Der Relai Bitcoin Podcast вАУ Der Bitcoin-B√§renmarkt zeigt bereits seine Z√§hne, mit Alex von Frankenberg | Relai Bitcoin Podcast #126
item.description:
Alex von Frankenberg ist seit Kurzem als Vollzeit-Bitcoiner aktiv und hat soeben sein Buch ins Englische √Љbersetzt. In der Vergangenheit war er als VC-Investor aktiv, aber er hat sich entschieden, mehr in der Community aktiv zu werden.

Im Gespr√§ch mit Relai-CEO Julian Liniger spricht Alex √Љber den aktuellen Bitcoin-B√§renmarkt, wie er die Lage mit Bitcoin-Treasury-Firmen sieht, weshalb er sein Buch auf Englisch √Љbersetzt hat und wohin die Reise in Zukunft geht.

Folge Alex auf X: https://x.com/Justdoitalex

Kaufe AlexвАЩs Buch hier: https://www.amazon.de/-/en/Bitcoin-Geldentwertung-Technologie-Inflation-Finanzkrisen/dp/3949098593/

вАФ

вП± Kapitel:

00:00 - Intro und Vorstellung

01:40 - Wie sch√§tzt Alex den Markt aktuell ein?

08:14 - Der Wettbewerb macht es schwer f√Љr Bitcoin

14:30 - Die Schere zwischen Arm und Reich wird immer gr√ґsser

17:01 - Wie sch√§tzt Alex die Situation mit Strategy ein?

21:04 - Werbeunterbrechung f√Љr die Relai-App

item.title: Krypto Corner вАУ Bitcoin, ETF und NFT: Sicher investieren - Krypto verstehen und sicher starten вАУ Episode #4: Der Krypto-Tresor вАУ Wie du deine Coins sicher nach Hause holst
item.description:
Willkommen zur√Љck zu einer neuen Podcast-Folge! рЯОЩпЄП

Episode #4: Der Krypto-Tresor вАУ Wie du deine Coins sicher nach Hause holst

Der Kauf ist abgeschlossen, die Satoshis liegen im Account der Krypto-B√ґrse. Julian denkt, er hat es geschafft. Doch Max muss ihm die bittere Realit√§t der Krypto-Welt erkl√§ren: Solange das Geld auf der B√ґrse liegt, hast du nur einen Schuldschein. Geht die B√ґrse pleite, ist das Geld unwiderruflich weg.

In dieser Episode der Krypto Corner sprechen wir √Љber den ultimativen Schritt zur finanziellen Souver√§nit√§t. Wir holen die Coins nach Hause. Max stellt der Berliner WG die "Hardware-Wallet" vor вАУ den absoluten Goldstandard der Krypto-Sicherheit.

In dieser Folge erf√§hrst du:¬†вАҐ Warum du B√ґrsen niemals als langfristiges Lager f√Љr deine Coins nutzen solltest. вАҐ Den Unterschied zwischen Hot Wallets (Apps) und Cold Wallets (Hardware-Sticks). вАҐ Wie du eine Krypto-√Ьberweisung machst, ohne aus Versehen dein ganzes Geld ins Nichts zu schicken. вАҐ Den ultimativen Profi-Tipp: Warum du immer eine kleine Test-Transaktion machen musst.

Diese Episode basiert auf Kapitel 4 des Einsteiger-Romans вАЮKrypto verstehen вАУ sicher starten. Band 1вАЬ von Sascha Swen Heiter. Verantwortung steht √Љber Spekulation. Bleib sicher und investiere mit K√ґpfchen!

рЯУЪ¬†Das Buch zur Show:¬†Wenn du das gesamte Wissen sofort anwenden m√ґchtest вАУ von der Einrichtung deiner Hardware Wallets √Љber die Nutzung von Burner Wallets bis hin zu wichtigen rechtlichen und steuerlichen Themen in der DACH-Region вАУ hol dir das komplette Buch! рЯСЙ¬†https://amzn.eu/d/06DuLLUw

рЯОІ¬†Krypto Corner Podcast:¬†H√ґrst du diese Folge gerade auf YouTube? Du findest den¬†Krypto Corner¬†Podcast auch auf Spotify, Apple Podcasts und √Љberall sonst, f√Љr regelm√§√Яige Deep-Dives und Sicherheits-Updates f√Љr unterwegs!

рЯСЗ¬†Unterst√Љtze den Kanal:¬†Wenn dir diese Folge geholfen hat, lass ein Abo da, gib dem Video einen Daumen nach oben und aktiviere die Glocke. Feedback, Fragen oder Themenw√Љnsche? Ab damit in die Kommentare!

вЪЦпЄП¬†Rechtliche Hinweise / Haftungsausschluss:¬†Die in diesem Podcast geteilten Inhalte dienen ausschlie√Яlich der allgemeinen Information sowie der Unterhaltung und stellen¬†keine Anlage-, Rechts- oder Steuerberatung¬†dar. Investitionen in Kryptow√§hrungen sind hochriskant und k√ґnnen zu einem Totalverlust des eingesetzten Kapitals f√Љhren. Jeder H√ґrer und Zuschauer handelt absolut eigenverantwortlich. Besonders bei steuerlichen Themen ist zu beachten, dass die steuerliche Behandlung von Kryptow√§hrungen sehr komplex ist. Bitte konsultiere f√Љr die aktuell geltende Rechtslage in der DACH-Region zwingend einen qualifizierten Steuerberater. Eine Haftung f√Љr Sch√§den, die aus der Nutzung der hier bereitgestellten Informationen entstehen, wird ausdr√Љcklich ausgeschlossen.

#Podcast #KryptoCorner #HardwareWallet #KryptoSicherheit #ColdWallet #Krypto #KryptoVerstehen #Bitcoin #KryptoAnf√§nger #Finanzwissen #Blockchain #Kapitel4



]]>

item.description:
In dieser Episode spricht Philipp mit Robin Seyr und Ben Raich im Auto auf dem Weg von San Salvador nach El Zonte √Љber ihre Eindr√Љcke aus El Salvador. Sie diskutieren die Bitcoin-Adoption, die Adopting Bitcoin-Konferenz, die Sicherheitslage, die allt√§gliche Nutzung von Bitcoin und die politische Situation unter Pr√§sident Bukele.


Wer ist Robin Seyr?

Robin Seyr ist Host vom t√§glichen Bitcoin Podcast.


Wer ist Ben Raich?

Ben Raich arbeitet mit Leidenschaft an vielf√§ltigen Projekten im Bitcoin-Space, um Bildung und Adaption von Bitcoin voranzutreiben. Sein Schwerpunkt liegt auf der Produktion hochwertiger Videopodcasts, dem Videoschnitt sowie journalistischen T√§tigkeiten.

item.title: Relai Bitcoin Podcast вАУ Bitcoin Is the Power Source of Every Company, with Michael Salyor| Relai Bitcoin Podcast #125
item.description:
Michael Saylor is the founder and chairman of Strategy, formerly MicroStrategy. He is the permanent Bitcoin bull and best known for having turned around his firm with Bitcoin into a $100 billion company.

In this live conversation with Relai CEO Julian Liniger, Michael discussed his path as an entrepreneur, what he would do today to start a new company, why Bitcoin is so vital for Strategy, and what digital credit actually is.

The interview was recorded at BTC Prague. Make sure to grab your tickets for next year! https://btcprague.com/

You can follow Michael on X: https://x.com/saylor

вАФ

вП± Timestamps:

00:00 - Intro

01:25 - How were the early days of Strategy?

18:03 - What would Michael do as a founder today?

35:28 - What happens to Strategy if Bitcoin goes down another 50%?

49:37 - Why did Strategy sell 32 Bitcoin?

59:49 - What would Michael say to people calling the company a systemic risk to Bitcoin?

01:09:35 - Outro

вАФ

item.title: The Bitcoin Treasury Podcast вАУ If You're Bearish On Strategy You're Actually Bearish On Bitcoin вАФ Here's Why
item.description:
Sam Callahan, Nick Payton, and Alexandre Laizet join Tyler Rowe to break down why STRC at $84 is a 13.7% yield opportunity, what caused the cascading peg breach, and why being bearish on Strategy means being bearish on Bitcoin.

*In this episode:*
вЬЕ Why STRC at $84 represents a 13.7% effective yield вАФ and Sam Callahan's case for why the numbers say it recovers

вЬЕ The cascading liquidation event explained вАФ leveraged carry trades in traditional finance, not DeFi, hit the same level and broke the peg in a cascade from 90 to 82

вЬЕ Why Strategy retiring convertible debt actually improved credit quality вАФ and why the market got it backwards

вЬЕ If you're bearish on Strategy, you're bearish on Bitcoin over the next five to ten years вАФ Sam Callahan makes the case

вЬЕ Three buckets for Bitcoin investors вАФ self-custody Bitcoin, digital equity (MSTR), digital credit (STRC/SATA) вАФ and who each is for

вЬЕ Alexandre's framework: Strike offers Bitcoin-backed loans, Strategy issues digital credit вАФ different sides of the same trade

вЬЕ Odell's tweet вАФ "never put yourself in a position where you need Bitcoin price to go up in the short term" вАФ and why four analysts think that's exactly what Strategy has avoided

вЬЕ BitGo hits Fortune 500 at #273 вАФ and how the inventor of Bitcoin's 2-of-3 multisig became the first infrastructure play to go public

вЬЕ Orange BTC's World Cup campaign вАФ buying 1 Bitcoin for every Brazil goal

*TIMESTAMPS:*
00:00 Cold Open
01:58 Navigating BTC / MSTR Bear Market
02:34 STRC, SATA Digital Credit Price Shocks
18:29 Market (Over)Reactions To Strategy
20:24 The Role of Investor Relations
28:37 Durable Bitcoin Treasury Strategies
39:02 Bitcoiner Criticism of Treasuries
59:52 Competition vs. Collaboration in BTC
1:06:57 Expanding Leveraged BTC Exposure
1:10:02 Oranje's World Cup Promotion
1:12:48 BitGo's Impact on Bitcoin Adoption

*рЯОЩпЄП Featured Guests:*
Sam Callahan вАФ Director of Bitcoin Strategy and Research, OranjeBTC.

Follow Sam at https://twitter.com/@samcallah

OranjeBTC: https://oranjebtc.com

Nick Payton вАФ VP of Marketing, BitGo.

Follow Nick at https://twitter.com/@NickDPayton

BitGo: https://bitgo.com

Alexandre Laizet вАФ Board Director of Bitcoin Strategy, Capital B.

Follow Alexandre at https://twitter.com/@AlexandreLaizet

Capital B: https://cptlb.com/

*рЯ§Э SUPPORT OUR SHOW:*
BitGo is the institutional-grade digital asset infrastructure trusted by thousands of institutions worldwide. A publicly traded company on the NYSE, BitGo offers regulated custody, OTC trading, financing, and settlement under one roof вАФ and holds a federally chartered national bank license from the OCC. Learn more at https://bit.ly/bitGo

COLDCARD is the industry-leading Bitcoin hardware wallet. Secure your Bitcoin at https://bit.ly/coinkiteStore вАФ use referral code 6BT to get 6% off at checkout!

Arch Lending offers the most transparent Bitcoin-backed borrowing experience in crypto вАФ industry-leading rates from 8.49%, qualified custody, no rehypothecation, and verifiable segregated addresses. Simple terms and public pricing at every size. Learn more at https://bit.ly/archlending

XCE Connecting Excellence Group is the UK's listed Bitcoin treasury recruitment company вАФ placing senior talent into Bitcoin companies globally and helping operating businesses build on a Bitcoin standard. Learn more at https://bit.ly/XCEio

Hemi вАФ Activate compliant Bitcoin yield without leaving custody. Follow them at https://twitter.com/@hemi_xyz and learn more at https://bit.ly/hemiXYZ

*рЯФЧ Resources:*
рЯФФ Follow Bitcoin Treasuries: https://twitter.com/@btctreasuries

item.itunes:summary:
Sam Callahan, Nick Payton, and Alexandre Laizet join Tyler Rowe to break down why STRC at $84 is a 13.7% yield opportunity, what caused the cascading peg breach, and why being bearish on Strategy means being bearish on Bitcoin.

*In this episode:*
вЬЕ Why STRC at $84 represents a 13.7% effective yield вАФ and Sam Callahan's case for why the numbers say it recovers

вЬЕ The cascading liquidation event explained вАФ leveraged carry trades in traditional finance, not DeFi, hit the same level and broke the peg in a cascade from 90 to 82

вЬЕ Why Strategy retiring convertible debt actually improved credit quality вАФ and why the market got it backwards

вЬЕ If you're bearish on Strategy, you're bearish on Bitcoin over the next five to ten years вАФ Sam Callahan makes the case

вЬЕ Three buckets for Bitcoin investors вАФ self-custody Bitcoin, digital equity (MSTR), digital credit (STRC/SATA) вАФ and who each is for

вЬЕ Alexandre's framework: Strike offers Bitcoin-backed loans, Strategy issues digital credit вАФ different sides of the same trade

вЬЕ Odell's tweet вАФ "never put yourself in a position where you need Bitcoin price to go up in the short term" вАФ and why four analysts think that's exactly what Strategy has avoided

вЬЕ BitGo hits Fortune 500 at #273 вАФ and how the inventor of Bitcoin's 2-of-3 multisig became the first infrastructure play to go public

вЬЕ Orange BTC's World Cup campaign вАФ buying 1 Bitcoin for every Brazil goal

*TIMESTAMPS:*
00:00 Cold Open
01:58 Navigating BTC / MSTR Bear Market
02:34 STRC, SATA Digital Credit Price Shocks
18:29 Market (Over)Reactions To Strategy
20:24 The Role of Investor Relations
28:37 Durable Bitcoin Treasury Strategies
39:02 Bitcoiner Criticism of Treasuries
59:52 Competition vs. Collaboration in BTC
1:06:57 Expanding Leveraged BTC Exposure
1:10:02 Oranje's World Cup Promotion
1:12:48 BitGo's Impact on Bitcoin Adoption

item.title: Epicenter - Learn about Crypto, Blockchain, Ethereum, Bitcoin and Distributed Technologies вАУ Vitalik Buterin on The Economic Zone (EEZ) Ep. 642
item.description:
In this special episode, we revisit a fireside conversation between Vitalik Buterin and Friederike Ernst at DappCon 2026 in Berlin. They explore the Ethereum Economic Zone (EEZ), a new vision for Ethereum built around synchronous composability, app chains, and real-time proving.


Following the fireside, Sebastien and Friederike break down the ideas behind the EEZ and discuss what this new paradigm could mean for Ethereum's future.


Topics covered include:

вАҐ The Ethereum Economic Zone and synchronous composability

вАҐ App chains, privacy networks, and prediction markets

вАҐ Ethereum as an economic operating system for the internet

вАҐ Sequencing, MEV, and shared liquidity across chains

вАҐ Enterprise, government, and institutional use cases

вАҐ Why this approach differs from Cosmos, Polkadot, and other ecosystem visions

вАҐ The future of Ethereum beyond rollup fragmentation


Links:

Lido: https://lido.fi/stvaults?mtm_campaign=epicenter


Sponsors:

Lido V3 introduces stVaults: a modular staking infrastructure that lets builders and institutions deploy custom staking vaults, while staying anchored to stETH as a shared liquidity layer.


Get started building with Lido V3 today: https://lido.fi/stvaults?mtm_campaign=epicenter

Block Space Forum: https://blockspace.forum/


NEAR AI Cloud now lets developers deploy OpenClawвАФthe rapidly growing open-source AI agent platformвАФinside Trusted Execution Environments, providing hardware-level encryption with cryptographic attestations. With OpenClaw on NEAR AI Cloud, you can run agents with cloud convenience, but without traditional cloud data exposure. No hardware to manage. No trust assumptions required. Learn more at near.ai.

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin.com News Interviews вАУ How Base Plans to Bring the Next Billion Users On-Chain | Xen Baynham-Herd
item.description: <![CDATA[What will bring the next billion users on-chain?At Proof of Talk 2026 in Paris, Alex Richardson sits down with Xen Baynham-Herd, Head of Marketing at Base, to explore how stablecoins, AI agents, tokenization, and open blockchain infrastructure are reshaping crypto adoption.In this episode, we discuss:- Why Base believes stablecoins are crypto's biggest breakthrough- How AI agents could accelerate on-chain adoption- What Base MCP means for developers- Why tokenized markets are gaining momentum- Open blockchains vs. permissioned networks- How USDC expands global financial access- Why builder communities are essential to Web3 growth- What institutions are looking for in cryptoRecorded at Proof of Talk 2026 in Paris.рЯОІ Listen now and follow Bitcoin.com News on Spotify for more conversations with the founders, builders, and industry leaders shaping the future of crypto, stablecoins, AI, and on-chain finance.Chapters:00:00 The Future of Crypto Adoption03:09 Building a Blockchain Ecosystem06:07 Innovations in DeFi and AI Integration08:57 Market Dynamics and User Engagement12:03 Global Access and Tokenized Assets14:55 The Role of Open Chains in Institutional Adoption]]>

item.title: 21talk вАУ Bitcoin im B√§renmarkt gefangen? Blocktrainer √Љber die Zukunft von Bitcoin I 21talk mit Roman Reher
item.description:
In dieser Folge des 21talks begr√Љ√Яen Clemens Jirasek (21bitcoin) und Daniel Winklhammer (CEO 21bitcoin) den bekannten Bitcoin-Experten Roman Reher (Blocktrainer), um √Љber die tiefgreifenden Ver√§nderungen in der Bitcoin-Welt und dem globalen Finanzsystem zu sprechen. Im Fokus steht die strategische Rolle von Unternehmen wie MicroStrategy: Erfahre, wie Treasury Companies den Markt beeinflussen, warum Bitcoin-basierte Finanzprodukte wie STRC den Weg zur Massenadoption ebnen und ob wir uns aktuell in einem psychologischen B√§renmarkt befinden.Dar√Љber hinaus geben die Experten spannende Einblicke in geopolitische Entwicklungen und √ґkonomische Modelle. Roman Reher analysiert kritisch das Power Law Modell, erl√§utert die Synergie zwischen Stablecoins und dem US-Dollar und diskutiert, warum Bitcoin als globales Reserve-Asset fungieren wird, ohne zwingend das t√§gliche Zahlungsmittel sein zu m√Љssen. Zum Abschluss teilen Clemens, Daniel und Roman pers√ґnliche Perspektiven √Љber den Ausbruch aus der вАЮFiat-MatrixвАЬ und geben wertvolle Ratschl√§ge f√Љr einen positiven Umgang mit der Zukunft in Europa.

3:58 PM(00:00) Aktuelle Marktstimmung & Strategien von Strategy (01:25) Befinden wir uns in einem B√§renmarkt? (02:45) Einfluss von Treasury Companies auf den Bitcoin-Preis (05:15) Wege zur Bitcoin-Adoption: Self-Custody vs. Broker (07:45) Wann kommt der gro√Яe Wechsel im Finanzsystem? (10:25) Risikoanalyse: Was passiert, wenn Strategy verkaufen muss? (18:50) Prognosen f√Љr den Bitcoin-Kurs zum Jahresende (23:00) Kritik am Power Law Modell & die Rolle des US-Dollars (25:00) Stablecoins als Chance f√Љr den US-Dollar (27:45) Bitcoin als Zahlungsmittel vs. Reserve-Asset (33:30) Europa vs. USA: Geopolitik und der digitale Euro (41:00) Umgang mit Zukunftsangst (45:10) "Was w√§re, wenn es Bitcoin nicht g√§be? (51:10) Die Matrix-Analogie & Schlusswort

]]>

(02:45) Einfluss von Treasury Companies auf den Bitcoin-Preis (05:15) Wege zur Bitcoin-Adoption: Self-Custody vs. Broker (07:45) Wann kommt der gro√Яe Wechsel im Finanzsystem? (18:50) Prognosen f√Љr den Bitcoin-Kurs zum Jahresende (23:00) Kritik am Power Law Modell & die Rolle des US-Dollars (25:00) Stablecoins als Chance f√Љr den US-Dollar (27:45) Bitcoin als Zahlungsmittel vs. Reserve-Asset (33:30) Europa vs. USA: Geopolitik und der digitale Euro (41:00) Umgang mit Zukunftsangst (45:10) "Was w√§re, wenn es Bitcoin nicht g√§be? (51:10) Die Matrix-Analogie & Schlusswort

item.title: Bitcoin Audible вАУ What does the woke left TRULY worship?
item.description:
The extreme left often claims to follow logic and "the science". But I've noticed a glaring pattern that contradicts this. And once you see it, you can't unsee it.

In this Take, I share my thoughts on the "holy trinity" the woke left actually worships. It starts with treating other people's money like magic. But seizing wealth is just the beginning. I break down the dangerous obsession with political authority and blind submission driving this hostile new religion.
